```{r}
#IWG forage figure P (ZF)
ZSIemmsP <- emmeans(modNZSI2, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(ZSIemmsP)
cld_dataZSIP <- cld(ZSIemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataZSIP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "cyan") 
IZSP<-ggplot(NdZSI_2, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "IWG Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))#+
#  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(250, 500, 750, 1000, 1250, 1500), limits = c(0, 1500))
print(IZSP)
#ggsave("figures/forage/IZSP.jpg", plot = IZSP, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#IWG forage figure C (ZF)
ZSIemmsC <- emmeans(modNZSI2, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(ZSIemmsC)
cld_dataZSIC <- cld(ZSIemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataZSIC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "cyan") 
IZSC<-ggplot(NdZSI_2, aes(x = CROP, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Cropping System", y = "IWG Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x =CROP, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(IZSC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/IZSC.jpg", plot = IZSC, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#N:C
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdZSI_2$P <- factor(NdZSI_2$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultZS<-emtrends(modNZSI2,~ N*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfZS <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultZS)
  emtrends_dfZS$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZS$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZS$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfZS$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZS$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfZS$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZS$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_resultsZS<-emmeans(modNZSI2, ~N*CROP, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfZS <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsZS)
mergedZS <- emtrends_dfZS %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfZS, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  dplyr::select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
ZS_df <- mergedZS %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedZS <- ZS_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sortedZS_I <- subset(sortedZS, CROP== "inter")
sortedZS_M <- subset(sortedZS, CROP== "monoI")

sym_I <- sortedZS_I %>%
  distinct(CROP) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 12000
  )
sym_M <- sortedZS_M %>%
  distinct(CROP) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 11500
  )

#plot
IcomboplotNCZS <- ggplot(data=NdZSI_2) +
  geom_point(data = NdZSI_2, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "IWG Forage", linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System", color = "Harvest")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
 # ylim(0, 1000) +
#  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture IWG"))+
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI_2, CROP == "inter"), fun=~2551.61+(8.3626*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI_2, CROP == "monoI"), fun=~4257.36+(9.0650*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedZS_I, mapping = aes(x = 15, y = 12000, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedZS_M, mapping = aes(x = 15, y = 11500, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 25, size = 1, fill = "lightgrey", stroke = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedZS_I, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 12000, label = plvl))+
  geom_text(data = sortedZS_M, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 11500, label = plvl)) # add stars to figure
# add stars to figure
print(IcomboplotNCZS)
# ggsave("figures/forage/IcomboplotNCZS.jpg", plot = IcomboplotNCZS, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#N:E
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdZSI_2$P <- factor(NdZSI_2$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultZ<-emtrends(modNZSI2,~ N*P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfZ <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultZ)
  emtrends_dfZ$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZ$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZ$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfZ$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZ$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfZ$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfZ$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfZ$P <- factor(emtrends_dfZ$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsZ<-emmeans(modNZSI2, ~N*P, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfZ <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsZ)
mergedZ <- emtrends_dfZ %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfZ, by = c("P")) %>%
  dplyr::select(P, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
mergedZ$P <- factor(mergedZ$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
Z_df <- mergedZ %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedZ <- Z_df %>%
  arrange(P)
#plot
IcomboplotNEZS <- ggplot(data=NdZSI_2) +
  geom_point(data = NdZSI_2, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "IWG Forage")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 12500) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(KS='Kansas', MN='Minnesota',
                                      NY='New York', WI='Wisconsin'))) +
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI_2, P== "MN"), fun=~2382.74+(7.4345*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI_2, P== "NY"), fun=~686.63+(1.4632*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI_2, P== "WI"), fun=~7144.09+(17.2438*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedZ, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 12500, label = equation),  size=3)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = sortedZ, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 12500, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
# add stars to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
print(IcomboplotNEZS)
# ggsave("figures/Paper/IcomboplotNEZS.jpg", plot = IcomboplotNEZS, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#figure E:C (ZS)
NdZSI_2$predicted <- predict(modNZSI2, newdata = NdZSI_2, re.form = NA)
IFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNZSI2, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(IFemmsPC)
cld_dataIFPC <- cld(IFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataIFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture IWG")
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
IZSEC<-ggplot(NdZSI_2, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "IWG Forage (Kg Ha-1)") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Summer")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(IZSEC)
```

#IWG forage year 3 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR 
modNZFI<-lmer(PlotIWGDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFI)
anova(modNZFI)
#Check assumptions
NZFI_resid<-resid(modNZFI)
qqnorm(NZFI_resid)
qqline(NZFI_resid)
plot(modNZFI)
#log
modNZFI1<-lmer(log(PlotIWGDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFI)
anova(modNZFI1)
#Check assumptions
NZFI1_resid<-resid(modNZFI1)
qqnorm(NZFI1_resid)
qqline(NZFI1_resid)
plot(modNZFI1)
# normal looks better than log transformed

modNZFI1_summary <- summary(modNZFI)
modNZFI1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNZFI1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNZFI1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y3 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotIWGDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/IWG_table_significant_coeff_yr3F.html")
# IWG_table_significant_coeff_yr3F

max(NdZFI$PlotIWGDryKgHa, na.rm = T)
#LINEAR plots
NdZFI$predicted <- predict(modNZFI, newdata = NdZFI, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdZFI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "IWG Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 3 F Relationship between IWG Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
#  ylim(0, 1600) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/IWGforage_Nrate_yr3F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsNPC <- emmeans(modNZFI, specs = ~ N*P*CROP, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
cld_dataNZFINPC <- cld(emmsNPC , Letters=custom_letters)

NZFI1emm <- compute_emmeansNZS("modNZFI")
#write.csv(NZFI1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NZFI1emm.csv')

#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
cld_dataNZFIP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise C
emmsC <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
cld_dataNZFIC <- cld(emmsC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFIN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFINC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNZFINC$response <- format(cld_dataNZFINC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNZFINC) <- NULL
cld_dataNZFINC<- cld_dataNZFINC %>%
  select(N, CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNZFINC) <- c("N", "Cropping System", "IWG Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNZFINC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
#Pairwise P:C
emmsPC <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ P*CROP,type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFIPC <- cld(emmsPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNZFIPC$response <- format(cld_dataNZFIPC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNZFIPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNZFIPC<- cld_dataNZFIPC %>%
  select(P, CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNZFIPC) <- c("Site", "Cropping System", "IWG Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNZFIPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFI,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$CROP <- factor(emtrends_df$CROP, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
#equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFI,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNZFI, ~P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("P", "CROP")) %>%
  select(P, CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$P <- factor(merged_df$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoI"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange(P, CROP)
#view(sorted_df)
#write.csv(sorted_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_IWGforage_yr3F.csv")
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFI,~ P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNZFI, ~P, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("P")) %>%
  select(P, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
merged_df$P <- factor(merged_df$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df3 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(P)
#view(sorted_df3)
#write.csv(sorted_df3, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_IWGforage_E_yr3F.csv")


#IWG forage figure E:C (ZF)
ZFIemmsPC <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(ZFIemmsPC)
cld_dataZFIPC <- cld(ZFIemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataZFIPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "cyan") 
IZFPC<-ggplot(NdZFI, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "IWG Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(250, 500, 750, 1000, 1250, 1500), limits = c(0, 1500))
print(IZFPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/IZFPC.jpg", plot = IZFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#figure E:C (ZF)
NdZFI$predicted <- predict(modNZFI, newdata = NdZFI, re.form = NA)
IFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNZFI, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(IFemmsPC)
cld_dataIFPC <- cld(IFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataIFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture IWG")
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
IZFEC<-ggplot(NdZFI, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "IWG Forage (Kg Ha-1)") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Fall")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(IZFEC)
```


# IWG Forage anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modNXSI1)
tableIFXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modNXFI1)
tableIFXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modNYSI1) 
tableIFYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFYS 

aov.tableYF <- anova(modNYFI1)
tableIFYF = flextable(data = aov.tableYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFYF

aov.tableZS <- anova(modNZSI2)
tableIFZS = flextable(data = aov.tableZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFZS 

aov.tableZF <- anova(modNZFI)
tableIFZF = flextable(data = aov.tableZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableIFZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_IFZF


my_modelsNG <- list(modNXSI1, modNXFI1, modNYSI1, modNYFI1, modNZSI2, modNZFI)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall", "Year 3 Summer", "Year 3 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("log", "log", "log", "log", "linear", "linear"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_IF.png", expand = 10)
```
