## Alfalfa Forage Yield 

#Alf forage year 1 summer
```{r}
#LINEAR 
modNXSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
anova(modNXSA)
#Check assumptions
NXSA_resid<-resid(modNXSA)
qqnorm(NXSA_resid)
qqline(NXSA_resid)
plot(modNXSA)
#log transform
modNXSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
anova(modNXSA1)
#Check assumptions
NXSA_resid1<-resid(modNXSA1)
qqnorm(NXSA_resid1)
qqline(NXSA_resid1)
plot(modNXSA1)
# could use either, normal is slightly better and includes significance for N:E and N:C

emtrends(modNXSA, ~P*CROP, var= "N")
emtrends(modNXSA, ~1, var= "N", infer= TRUE) #(averages 8 slopes across interactions)
emmip(modNXSA, P~N|CROP, at=list(N=c(40, 80, 120)))

modNXSA_summary <- summary(modNXSA)
modNXSA_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNXSA_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNXSA_coeff, 
               caption = "Y1 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: (PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1S    

#(old)
#rec
modNXSAN<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N+P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
emtrends(modNXSAN, ~1, var= "N", infer= TRUE)
emmip(modNXSAN, P~N|CROP, at=list(N=c(0, 80, 160)))

max(NdXSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa, na.rm=T)
#linear plots
NdXSA$predicted <- predict(modNXSA, newdata = NdXSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 1 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
#  ylim(0, 11000) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr1S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NXSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS("modNXSA")
#write.csv(NXSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NXSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (XS)
max(NdXSA$predicted)
XSAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXSA, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(XSAemmsPC)
cld_dataXSAPC <- cld(XSAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataXSAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AXSPC<-ggplot(NdXSA, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
   guides(color = "none")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 9500))
print(AXSPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AXSPC.jpg", plot = AXSPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)


#alf forage plot N (XS)
#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXSA,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXSA, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend), SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x), percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr1S.csv") 
AFplotN <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape= CROP), color= "red") +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("intercrop" = 4, "monoculture" = 20), labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa")) +
  geom_function(data=NdXSA, fun=~4650.27+(-2.1321*.x),color='red')+
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Cropping System"))
print(AFplotN)

# equations and plot N:C
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXSA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))    
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXSA, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sorted_df2
sorted_I <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "inter")
sorted_A <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoA")
sym_I <- sorted_I %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 10600
  )
sym_A <- sorted_A %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 10400
  )
# N rate across C 
AFNCXS <- ggplot(data=NdXSA) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~3479.07+(-5.1720*.x), color='#000000')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~5821.46+(0.9077*.x), color='#000000')+
  ggtitle("Year 1 Summer \nRelationship between Alfalfa Forage and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 10750) +
  geom_text(data = sorted_I, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 10600, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_A, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 10400, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 10600, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 10400, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                     labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 4, 1))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg ha-1)", shape = "Cropping System") +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
AFNCXS

#figure E:C (XS)
NdXSA$predicted <- predict(modNXSA, newdata = NdXSA, re.form = NA)
AFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXSA, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(AFemmsPC)
cld_dataAFPC <- cld(AFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataAFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
xlabels <- c("Kansas", "Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
AXSEC<-ggplot(NdXSA, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg Ha-1)") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1))+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Summer")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(AXSEC)

#N:E
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdXSA$P <- factor(NdXSA$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultX<-emtrends(modNXSA,~ N*P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfX <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultX)
  emtrends_dfX$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfX$P <- factor(emtrends_dfX$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsX<-emmeans(modNXSA, ~N*P, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfX <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsX)
mergedX <- emtrends_dfX %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfX, by = c("P")) %>%
  dplyr::select(P, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
mergedX$P <- factor(mergedX$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
X_df <- mergedX %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedX <- X_df %>%
  arrange(P)
sortedX
#plot
AcomboplotNEXS <- ggplot(data=NdXSA) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 10550) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(KS='Kansas', MN='Minnesota',
                                      NY='New York', WI='Wisconsin'))) +
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, P== "KS"), fun=~6077.28+(3.2854*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, P== "MN"), fun=~3111.87+(-3.1939*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, P== "NY"), fun=~5586.22+(-8.2667*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSA, P== "WI"), fun=~3825.70+(-0.3535*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 15, y = 10500, label = equation),  size=3)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 10500, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  ggtitle("Year 1 Summer") +  # Add a title
# add stars to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
print(AcomboplotNEXS)
```

#Alf forage year 1 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNXFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFA)
anova(modNXFA)
#Check assumptions
NXFA_resid<-resid(modNXFA)
qqnorm(NXFA_resid)
qqline(NXFA_resid)
plot(modNXFA)
#log transform
modNXFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFA)
anova(modNXFA1)
#Check assumptions
NXFA1_resid<-resid(modNXFA1)
qqnorm(NXFA1_resid)
qqline(NXFA1_resid)
plot(modNXFA1)

modNXFA1_summary <- summary(modNXFA1)
modNXFA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNXFA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNXFA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y1 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1F

max(NdXFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#linear plots
NdXFA$predicted <- predict(modNXFA1, newdata = NdXFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdXFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 1 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
#  ylim(0, 3300) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr1F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NXFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNXF("modNXFA1")
#write.csv(NXFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NXFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (XF)
XFAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(XFAemmsPC)
cld_dataXFAPC <- cld(XFAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataXFAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AXFPC<-ggplot(NdXFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 3500))
print(AXFPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AXFPC.jpg", plot = AXFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#alf forage plot N (YS)
#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXFA1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXFA1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr1F.csv") 

#figure E:C (XS)
NdXFA$predicted <- predict(modNXFA1, newdata = NdXFA, re.form = NA)
AFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(AFemmsPC)
cld_dataAFPC <- cld(AFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataAFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
AXFEC<-ggplot(NdXFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg Ha-1)") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1))+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Fall \nbacktransformed for visualization")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(AXFEC)




#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXFAP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise P:C
emmsPC <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P*CROP, type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXFAPC <- cld(emmsPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXFAPC$response <- format(cld_dataNXFAPC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNXFAPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNXFAPC<- cld_dataNXFAPC %>%
  select(P,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXFAPC) <- c("Site","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNXFAPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXFA1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXFA1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
view(merged_df)
```

#Alf forage year 2 summer
```{r}
# remove MN plot 1222, it only has 0 for values
NdYSA <- NdYSA %>%
  filter(Plot != 1222)

#LINEAR 
modNYSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSA)
anova(modNYSA)
#Check assumptions
NYSA_resid<-resid(modNYSA)
qqnorm(NYSA_resid)
qqline(NYSA_resid)
plot(modNYSA)
#Logtransform
modNYSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSA)
anova(modNYSA1)
#check assumptions logtransform
NYSA_resid1<-resid(modNYSA1)
qqnorm(NYSA_resid1)
qqline(NYSA_resid1)
plot(modNYSA1)
# normal is slightly better and has additional significance for N:E and N:C

modNYSA_summary <- summary(modNYSA)
modNYSA_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNYSA_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNYSA_coeff, 
               caption = "Y2 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: (PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2S

max(NdYSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa, na.rm=T)
#LINEAR plots
NdYSA$predicted <- predict(modNYSA, newdata = NdYSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr2S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NYSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNYS("modNYSA")
#write.csv(NYSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NYSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (YS)
NYSAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYSAemmsP)
cld_dataNYSAP <- cld(NYSAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYSAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AYSE<-ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = P, y = (predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AYSE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYSE.jpg", plot = AYSE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#Alfalfa forage figure C (YS)
YSAemmsC <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(YSAemmsC)
cld_dataYSAC <- cld(YSAemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataYSAC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "cyan") 
AYSC<-ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = CROP, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Cropping System", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x =CROP, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 2 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(AYSC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYSC.jpg", plot = AYSC, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# equations and plot N:C
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYSA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))    
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYSA, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sorted_df2
sorted_I <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "inter")
sorted_A <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoA")
sym_I <- sorted_I %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 6450
  )
sym_A <- sorted_A %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 6300
  )
# N rate across C 
AFNCYS <- ggplot(data=NdYSA) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~1969.24+(-6.0479*.x), color='#000000')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~2990.56+(0.8299*.x), color='#000000')+
  ggtitle("Year 2 Summer \nRelationship between Alfalfa Forage and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 6500) +
  geom_text(data = sorted_I, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 6450, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_A, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 6300, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 6450, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 6300, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                     labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 4, 1))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg ha-1)", shape = "Cropping System") +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
AFNCYS

#N:E
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdYSA$P <- factor(NdYSA$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultX<-emtrends(modNYSA,~ N*P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfX <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultX)
  emtrends_dfX$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfX$P <- factor(emtrends_dfX$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsX<-emmeans(modNYSA, ~N*P, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfX <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsX)
mergedX <- emtrends_dfX %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfX, by = c("P")) %>%
  dplyr::select(P, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
mergedX$P <- factor(mergedX$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
X_df <- mergedX %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedX <- X_df %>%
  arrange(P)
sortedX
#plot
AcomboplotNEYS <- ggplot(data=NdYSA) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 6250) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(KS='Kansas', MN='Minnesota',
                                      NY='New York', WI='Wisconsin'))) +
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, P== "KS"), fun=~1148.03+(2.8910*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, P== "MN"), fun=~1837.72+(-3.7801*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, P== "NY"), fun=~3595.74+(-6.4583*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSA, P== "WI"), fun=~3338.11+(-3.0887*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 15, y = 6150, label = equation),  size=3)+ # add equation 
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 6150, label = plvl))+ # add stars 
  ggtitle("Year 2 Summer") +  # Add title
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
print(AcomboplotNEYS)

# Boxplot for alfalfa by E
NYSAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYSAemmsP)
cld_dataNYSAP <- cld(NYSAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYSAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Kansas", "Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
AFEYS <- ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = P, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Summer", x = "Location", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg Ha-1)")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```

#Alf forage year 2 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNYFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFA)
anova(modNYFA)
#Check assumptions
NYFA_resid<-resid(modNYFA)
qqnorm(NYFA_resid)
qqline(NYFA_resid)
plot(modNYFA)
#log transform 
modNYFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFA)
anova(modNYFA1)
#Check assumptions
NYFA1_resid<-resid(modNYFA1)
qqnorm(NYFA1_resid)
qqline(NYFA1_resid)
plot(modNYFA1)

modNYFA1_summary <- summary(modNYFA1)
modNYFA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNYFA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNYFA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y2 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2F

max(NdYFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdYFA$predicted <- predict(modNYFA1, newdata = NdYFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr2F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NYFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNYF("modNYFA1")
#write.csv(NYFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NYFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (YF)
NYFAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYFAemmsP)
cld_dataNYFAP <- cld(NYFAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYFAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AYFE<-ggplot(NdYFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AYFE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYFE.jpg", plot = AYFE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#equations table (N equations across cropping system)
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
#view(sorted_df2)
#write.csv(sorted_df2, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr2F_2.csv")

#N:E:C
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdYFA$P <- factor(NdYFA$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultYF<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ N*P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfYF <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultYF)
  emtrends_dfYF$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfYF$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfYF$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfYF$PC <- paste0(emtrends_dfYF$P,emtrends_dfYF$CROP)
  emtrends_dfYF$P <- factor(emtrends_dfYF$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsYF<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~N*P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfYF <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsYF)
  emmeans_dfYF$PC <- paste0(emmeans_dfYF$P,emmeans_dfYF$CROP)
mergedYF <- emtrends_dfYF %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfYF, by = c("PC")) %>%
  dplyr::select(PC, P.x, CROP.x, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
  colnames(mergedYF)[2] <- "P"
  colnames(mergedYF)[3] <- "CROP"
mergedYF$P <- factor(mergedYF$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
YF_df <- mergedYF %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedYF <- YF_df %>%
  arrange(P)
sortedYF_I <- subset(sortedYF, CROP== "inter")
sortedYF_M <- subset(sortedYF, CROP== "monoA")

sym_I <- sortedYF_I %>%
  distinct(P) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 5000
  )
sym_M <- sortedYF_M %>%
  distinct(P) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 4750
  )
#plot
AcomboplotNECYF <- ggplot(data=NdYFA) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage", linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System", color = "Harvest")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 1),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa"))+
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "MN" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~2215.30*exp(-0.0019*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "MN" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~2243.71*exp(-0.0008*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "NY" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~1598.31*exp(-0.0034*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "NY" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~1523.22*exp(0.0001*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "WI" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~1949.28*exp(-0.0030*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "WI" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~1495.54*exp(-0.0006*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_I, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 5000, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_M, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 4750, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_I, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 5000, label = plvl))+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_M, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 4750, label = plvl)) # add stars to figure
# add stars to figure
print(AcomboplotNECYF)
# ggsave("figures/forage/AcomboplotNECYF.jpg", plot = AcomboplotNECYF, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# equations and plot N:C
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))    
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sorted_df2
sorted_I <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "inter")
sorted_A <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoA")
sym_I <- sorted_I %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 4550
  )
sym_A <- sorted_A %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 4450
  )
# N rate across C 
AFNCYF <- ggplot(data=NdYFA) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~1903.95*exp(-0.0028*.x), color='#000000')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~1722.57*exp(-0.0004*.x), color='#000000')+
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall \nRelationship between Alfalfa Forage and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 4750) +
  geom_text(data = sorted_I, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 4550, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_A, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 4450, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 4550, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 4450, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                     labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 4, 1))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg ha-1)", shape = "Cropping System") +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
AFNCYF

# Boxplot for alfalfa by E
NYFAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYFAemmsP)
cld_dataNYFAP <- cld(NYFAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYFAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
AFEYF <- ggplot(NdYFA, aes(x = P, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall", x = "Location", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg Ha-1)")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```

#Alf forage year 3 summer
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNZSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZSA)
anova(modNZSA)
#Check assumptions
NZSA_resid<-resid(modNZSA)
qqnorm(NZSA_resid)
qqline(NZSA_resid)
plot(NZSA_resid)
plot(modNZSA)
#log transform 
modNZSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZSA)
anova(modNZSA1)
#Check assumptions
NZSA1_resid<-resid(modNZSA1)
qqnorm(NZSA1_resid)
qqline(NZSA1_resid)
plot(NZSA1_resid)
plot(modNZSA1)

modNZSA1_summary <- summary(modNZSA1)
modNZSA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNZSA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNZSA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y3 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3S

max(NdZSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdZSA$predicted <- predict(modNZSA1, newdata = NdZSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdZSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 3 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr3S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NZSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNZS("modNZSA1")
#write.csv(NZSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NZSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (ZS)
NZSAemmsP <- emmeans(modNZSA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NZSAemmsP)
cld_dataNZSAP <- cld(NZSAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNZSAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AZSE<-ggplot(NdZSA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AZSE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AZSE.jpg", plot = AZSE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)







#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYFANC$response <- format(cld_dataNYFANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- NULL
cld_dataNYFANC<- cld_dataNYFANC %>%
  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNYFANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$CROP <- factor(emtrends_df$CROP, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
  #equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( CROP)
#view(sorted_df)
```

#Alf forage year 3 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNZFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFA)
anova(modNZFA)
#Check assumptions
NZFA_resid<-resid(modNZFA)
qqnorm(NZFA_resid)
qqline(NZFA_resid)
plot(NZFA_resid)
plot(modNZFA)
#log transform 
modNZFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa+0.0001)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFA)
anova(modNZFA1)
#Check assumptions
NZFA1_resid<-resid(modNZFA1)
qqnorm(NZFA1_resid)
qqline(NZFA1_resid)
plot(NZFA1_resid)
plot(modNZFA1)
# normal is much better, but does not have E:C as significant which log does

modNZFA_summary <- summary(modNZFA)
modNZFA_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNZFA_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNZFA_coeff, 
               caption = "Y3 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: (PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3F

max(NdZFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa, na.rm = T)
#LINEAR plots
NdZFA$predicted <- predict(modNZFA, newdata = NdZFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdZFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 3 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr3F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NZFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNZF("modNZFA")
#write.csv(NZFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NZFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (ZF)
ZFAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNZFA, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(ZFAemmsPC)
cld_dataZFAPC <- cld(ZFAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataZFAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AZFPC<-ggplot(NdZFA, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))#+
#  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 4000))
print(AZFPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AZFPC.jpg", plot = AZFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)





#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNZFA, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNZFA, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNZFANC$response <- format(cld_dataNZFANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNZFANC) <- NULL
cld_dataNZFANC<- cld_dataNZFANC %>%
  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNZFANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNZFANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$CROP <- factor(emtrends_df$CROP, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
  #equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNZFA, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( CROP)
#view(sorted_df)

# Boxplot for alfalfa by E
NdZFA$predicted <- predict(modNZFA, newdata = NdZFA, re.form = NA)
AemmsP <- emmeans(modNZFA, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(AemmsP)
cld_dataAP <- cld(AemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
AFEZF <- ggplot(NdZFA, aes(x = P, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 3 Fall", x = "Location", y = "Alfalfa Forage (Kg Ha-1)")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```


# Alf Forage anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modNXSA)
tableAFXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableAFXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modNXFA1)
tableAFXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableAFXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFXF

tableAFYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%

                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")

                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableAFYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFYF

aov.tableZS <- anova(modNZSA1)
tableAFZS = flextable(data = aov.tableZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",

                    )%>%

print(tableAFZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFZS 

aov.tableZF <- anova(modNZFA)
tableAFZF = flextable(data = aov.tableZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableAFZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFZF


my_modelsNG <- list(modNXSA, modNXFA1, modNYSA, modNYFA1, modNZSA1, modNZFA)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall", "Year 3 Summer", "Year 3 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("linear", "log", "linear", "log", "log", "linear"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_AF.png", expand = 10)
```

#Alf forage plots N:C 
```{r}
# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple", 
            "Year 3 Summer Harvest" = "orange")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest", "Year 1 Fall Harvest",
                  "Year 2 Summer Harvest", "Year 2 Fall Harvest",
                  "Year 3 Summer Harvest")
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdXSA$P <- factor(NdXSA$P, levels = desired_order)
NdYSA$P <- factor(NdYSA$P, levels = desired_order)
NdZSA$P <- factor(NdZSA$P, levels = desired_order)

max(NdXSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdXFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdYSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdYFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdZSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)

AFcomboplotNC <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = NdXSA, aes(N, (predicted), color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdXFA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdXFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdYSA, aes(N, (predicted), color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdYFA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdZSA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 3 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdZFA, aes(N, (predicted), color = "Year 3 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield",
       color = "Harvest", 
       linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System") +
  ggtitle("Relationship Between Alfalfa Forage Yield and N-rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 10000) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa") )+
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("inter" = "solid", "monoA" = "dotted"),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa"))
print(AFcomboplotNC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AFcomboplotNC.jpg", plot = AFcomboplotNC, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## Proportion of species in Total Forage Yield
From Megan: values and analysis of proportion of each species in total forage yield for intercropped plots. Not proportional partial LER, but just proportion of normal yields in the total. The code for PrPLER should be helpful to run that analysis though! You’ll just want to make sure there isn’t a C factor since we’re only looking at one cropping system and that you’re only pulling intercropped plot yields.

# proportion of species in Total Forage Yield of intercropped plots calculations
```{r}
# Year 1 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdXSPrIA <- NdXS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 1 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdXFPrIA <- NdXF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 2 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdYSPrIA <- NdYS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 2 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdYFPrIA <- NdYF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 3 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdZSPrIA <- NdZS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 3 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdZFPrIA <- NdZF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  filter(!is.na(PlotIWGDryKgHa), !is.na(PlotAlfDryKgHa)) %>%   # drop rows where either forage amount is NA
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
```

# Species Proportions Year 1 S
```{r}
# Proportion IWG in total forage XS
#model by nrate XS
modIPrIAXS<-lmer(PropIWG~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXS)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXS_resid<-resid(modIPrIAXS)
qqnorm(IPrIAXS_resid)
qqline(IPrIAXS_resid)
plot(modIPrIAXS)
#Logtransform
modIPrIAXS1<-lmer(log(PropIWG)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXS1)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXS_resid1<-resid(modIPrIAXS1)
qqnorm(IPrIAXS_resid1)
qqline(IPrIAXS_resid1)
plot(modIPrIAXS1)
# normal looks better, but log has added sig of N:P

# Proportion Alf in total forage XS
#model by nrate XS
modAPrIAXS<-lmer(PropALF~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXS)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXS_resid<-resid(modAPrIAXS)
qqnorm(APrIAXS_resid)
qqline(APrIAXS_resid)
plot(modAPrIAXS)
#Logtransform
modAPrIAXS1<-lmer(log(PropALF)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXS1)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXS_resid1<-resid(modAPrIAXS1)
qqnorm(APrIAXS_resid1)
qqline(APrIAXS_resid1)
plot(modAPrIAXS1)
# normal looks better, but same significances

# manipulate into long format
NdXSPrIA_long <- NdXSPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdXSPrIA_long2 <- NdXSPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAXSplot <- ggplot(NdXSPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 1 Summer")
# save figures/forage/PrIAXSplot    1022x884

# pairwise comparisons between N rates
NdXSPrIA$N <- factor(NdXSPrIA$N)
modIPrIAXS1 <- update(modIPrIAXS1)
emmsN <- emmeans(modIPrIAXS1, pairwise ~ N|P) 
cld_dataIPrIAXS1 <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataIPrIAXS1$response <- format(cld_dataIPrIAXS1$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataIPrIAXS1) <- NULL
cld_dataIPrIAXS1<- cld_dataIPrIAXS1 %>%
  select(N, P, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataIPrIAXS1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/Pr_table_Nrate_IXS  430x245
modAPrIAXS1 <- update(modAPrIAXS1)
emmsN <- emmeans(modAPrIAXS1, pairwise ~ N) 
cld_dataAPrIAXS1 <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataAPrIAXS1$response <- format(cld_dataAPrIAXS1$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataAPrIAXS1) <- NULL
cld_dataAPrIAXS1<- cld_dataAPrIAXS1 %>%
  select(N, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataAPrIAXS1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/Pr_table_Nrate_AXS  430x245
```

# Species Proportions Year 1 F
```{r}
# Proportion IWG in total forage XF
#model by nrate XF
modIPrIAXF<-lmer(PropIWG~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXFPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXF)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXF_resid<-resid(modIPrIAXF)
qqnorm(IPrIAXF_resid)
qqline(IPrIAXF_resid)
plot(modIPrIAXF)
#Logtransform
modIPrIAXF1<-lmer(log(PropIWG)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXFPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXF1)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXF_resid1<-resid(modIPrIAXF1)
qqnorm(IPrIAXF_resid1)
qqline(IPrIAXF_resid1)
plot(modIPrIAXF1)
# normal looks better, but log has added sig of N

# Proportion Alf in total forage XF
#model by nrate XF
modAPrIAXF<-lmer(PropALF~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXFPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXF)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXF_resid<-resid(modAPrIAXF)
qqnorm(APrIAXF_resid)
qqline(APrIAXF_resid)
plot(modAPrIAXF)
#Logtransform
modAPrIAXF1<-lmer(log(PropALF)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXFPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXF1)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXF_resid1<-resid(modAPrIAXF1)
qqnorm(APrIAXF_resid1)
qqline(APrIAXF_resid1)
plot(modAPrIAXF1)

# manipulate into long format
NdXFPrIA_long <- NdXFPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdXFPrIA_long2 <- NdXFPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAXFplot <- ggplot(NdXFPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 1 Fall")
# save figures/forage/PrIAXFplot    1022x884

# pairwise comparisons between N rates
NdXFPrIA$N <- factor(NdXFPrIA$N)
modIPrIAXF1 <- update(modIPrIAXF1)
emmsN <- emmeans(modIPrIAXF1, pairwise ~ N) 
cld_dataIPrIAXF1 <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataIPrIAXF1$response <- format(cld_dataIPrIAXF1$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataIPrIAXF1) <- NULL
cld_dataIPrIAXF1<- cld_dataIPrIAXF1 %>%
  select(N, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataIPrIAXF1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

```

```{r}
# manipulate into long format
NdYSPrIA_long <- NdYSPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdYSPrIA_long2 <- NdYSPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAYSplot <- ggplot(NdYSPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 2 Summer")
# save figures/forage/PrIAYSplot    1022x884
```

# Species Proportions Year 2 F
```{r}
# Proportion IWG in total forage YF
#model by nrate YF
modIPrIAYF<-lmer(PropIWG~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdYFPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAYF)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAYF_resid<-resid(modIPrIAYF)
qqnorm(IPrIAYF_resid)
qqline(IPrIAYF_resid)
plot(modIPrIAYF)
#Logtransform
modIPrIAYF1<-lmer(log(PropIWG)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdYFPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAYF1)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAYF_resid1<-resid(modIPrIAYF1)
qqnorm(IPrIAYF_resid1)
qqline(IPrIAYF_resid1)
plot(modIPrIAYF1)

# Proportion Alf in total forage YF
#model by nrate YF
modAPrIAYF<-lmer(PropALF~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdYFPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAYF)
#check assumptions 
APrIAYF_resid<-resid(modAPrIAYF)
qqnorm(APrIAYF_resid)
qqline(APrIAYF_resid)
plot(modAPrIAYF)
#Logtransform
modAPrIAYF1<-lmer(log(PropALF)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdYFPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAYF1)
#check assumptions 
APrIAYF_resid1<-resid(modAPrIAYF1)
qqnorm(APrIAYF_resid1)
qqline(APrIAYF_resid1)
plot(modAPrIAYF1)

# manipulate into long format
NdYFPrIA_long <- NdYFPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdYFPrIA_long2 <- NdYFPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAYFplot <- ggplot(NdYFPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 2 Fall")
# save figures/forage/PrIAYFplot    1022x884
```

```{r}
# Proportion IWG in total forage ZS
#model by nrate ZS
modIPrIAZS<-lmer(PropIWG~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdZSPrIA )

#check assumptions

qqnorm(IPrIAZS_resid1)
qqline(IPrIAZS_resid1)
plot(modIPrIAZS1)
# normal looks better, normal shows N as significant while log shoes P as significant 

# Proportion Alf in total forage ZS
#model by nrate ZS
modAPrIAZS<-lmer(PropALF~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdZSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAZS)

APrIAZS_resid<-resid(modAPrIAZS)

qqline(APrIAZS_resid)
plot(modAPrIAZS)
#Logtransform
modAPrIAZS1<-lmer(log(PropALF)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdZSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAZS1)
#check assumptions 
APrIAZS_resid1<-resid(modAPrIAZS1)
qqnorm(APrIAZS_resid1)
qqline(APrIAZS_resid1)
plot(modAPrIAZS1)

# manipulate into long format
NdZSPrIA_long <- NdZSPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdZSPrIA_long2 <- NdZSPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAZSplot <- ggplot(NdZSPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 3 Summer")
# save figures/forage/PrIAZSplot    1022x884
```

# Species Proportions anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableIXS <- anova(modIPrIAXS1)
tablePrIXS = flextable(data = aov.tableIXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIXS 

aov.tableAXS <- anova(modAPrIAXS1)
tablePrAXS = flextable(data = aov.tableAXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAXS

tablePrIXF = flextable(data = aov.tableIXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>%

                    rownames_to_column(" "))

                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%

                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%

                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
```
