```{r}
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAZF

my_modelsNG <- list(modIPrIAXS1, modAPrIAXS1, modIPrIAXF1, modAPrIAXF1, modIPrIAYS1, modAPrIAYS1, modIPrIAYF1, modAPrIAYF1, modIPrIAZS1, modAPrIAZS1, modIPrIAZF1, modAPrIAZF1)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("IWG Pr Year 1 S", "ALF Pr Year 1 S", "IWG Pr Year 1 F", "ALF Pr Year 1 F", "IWG Pr Year 2 S", "ALF Pr Year 2 S", "IWG Pr Year 2 F", "ALF Pr Year 2 F", "IWG Pr Year 3 S", "ALF Pr Year 3 S", "IWG Pr Year 3 F", "ALF Pr Year 3 F")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "model") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "Environment (E)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "Cropping System (C)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(model, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_PrIA.png", expand = 10)
```


## LER

# LER calculations 
```{r}
# Nd SW 0 
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW0IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW0 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 5])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW0ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW0 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 15])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW0TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW0 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 5]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 15])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults1<-left_join(NdSW0IWGLER, NdSW0ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW0<-left_join(LERresults1, NdSW0TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

# Nd SW 40 
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW40IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW40 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 6])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW40ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW40 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 16])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW40TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW40 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 6]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 16])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults2<-left_join(NdSW40IWGLER, NdSW40ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW40<-left_join(LERresults2, NdSW40TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 80
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW80IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW80 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 7])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW80ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW80 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 17])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW80TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW80 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 7]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 17])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults3<-left_join(NdSW80IWGLER, NdSW80ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW80<-left_join(LERresults3, NdSW80TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 120
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW120IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW120 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 8])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW120ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW120 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 18])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW120TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW120 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 8]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 18])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults4<-left_join(NdSW120IWGLER, NdSW120ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW120<-left_join(LERresults4, NdSW120TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 160
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW160IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW160= (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 9])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW160ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW160 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 19])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW160TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW160 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 9]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 19])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults5<-left_join(NdSW160IWGLER, NdSW160ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW160<-left_join(LERresults5, NdSW160TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#merge all LER results into one data frame
LERresults6<-left_join(LERresultsNdSW0, LERresultsNdSW40, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresults7<-left_join(LERresults6, LERresultsNdSW80, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresults8<-left_join(LERresults7, LERresultsNdSW120, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresultsNdSWALL<-left_join(LERresults8, LERresultsNdSW160, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Rearrange dataframe
LERresultsNdSWALL_long <- LERresultsNdSWALL %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("PartialLER") | starts_with("TotalLER"),
               names_to = "Nrate",
               values_to = "LER")

#try to make the dataframe more usable

#cut off total and partial 
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type <- sub("^(Partial|Total)", "", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$tot_or_part <- sub("^(Partial|Total).*", "\\1", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)

#cut off LERIWGSW and LERAlfSW and LERSW
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$NRATE <- sub("^(LERIWGSW|LERAlfSW|LERSW)", "", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$PlotType <- sub("^(LERIWGSW|LERAlfSW|LERSW).*", "\\1", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)

#get rid of pesky NA results (caused by missing plots inherent in year 1 KS summer data)
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA<- na.omit(LERresultsNdSWALL_long)

LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE<-as.numeric(LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE)

#includes total and partial until it doesn't...used for some pairwise comparison thingy. 
LERResultsAllX<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'X',]
LERResultsAllY<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Y',]
LERResultsAllZ<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Z',]
LERResultsAllXS<-LERResultsAllX[LERResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllXF<-LERResultsAllX[LERResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllYS<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllYF<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllZS<-LERResultsAllZ[LERResultsAllZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllZF<-LERResultsAllZ[LERResultsAllZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
  
# change Inf values to NA
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA['LER'][LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA['LER'] == 'Inf'] <- NA
  
#okay now I should be able to split by total and partial
TotalLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  TotLERX<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  TotLERY<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  TotLERZ<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  TotLERXS<-TotLERX[TotLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERXF<-TotLERX[TotLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  TotLERYS<-TotLERY[TotLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERYF<-TotLERY[TotLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  TotLERZS<-TotLERZ[TotLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERZF<-TotLERZ[TotLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
IWGPartialLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW',]
IWGPartialLERresults$NRATE<- as.numeric(IWGPartialLERresults$NRATE)
  IWGPLERX<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  IWGPLERY<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  IWGPLERZ<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  IWGPLERXS<-IWGPLERX[IWGPLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERXF<-IWGPLERX[IWGPLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  IWGPLERYS<-IWGPLERY[IWGPLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERYF<-IWGPLERY[IWGPLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  IWGPLERZS<-IWGPLERZ[IWGPLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERZF<-IWGPLERZ[IWGPLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
AlfPartialLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW',]
AlfPartialLERresults$NRATE<- as.numeric(AlfPartialLERresults$NRATE)
  AlfPLERX<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  AlfPLERY<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  AlfPLERZ<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  AlfPLERXS<-AlfPLERX[AlfPLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERXF<-AlfPLERX[AlfPLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  AlfPLERYS<-AlfPLERY[AlfPLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERYF<-AlfPLERY[AlfPLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  AlfPLERZS<-AlfPLERZ[AlfPLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERZF<-AlfPLERZ[AlfPLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  
#Check for outliers
identify_outliers(TotalLERresults[, 6]) #19 outliers 
identify_outliers(IWGPartialLERresults[, 6]) #26 outliers
identify_outliers(AlfPartialLERresults[, 6]) #4 outliers 

#rename variables in dataframes to make life easier 
# Function to add new columns to a dataframe
add_new_columns <- function(df) {
  df$N <- df$NRATE
  return(df)
}
# List of dataframes (replace these with your actual dataframes)
df_list <- list(TotLERXS, TotLERYS, TotLERZS, 
                TotLERXF, TotLERYF, TotLERZF, 
                IWGPLERXS, IWGPLERYS, IWGPLERZS, 
                IWGPLERXF, IWGPLERYF, IWGPLERZF, 
                AlfPLERXS, AlfPLERYS, AlfPLERZS,
                AlfPLERXF, AlfPLERYF, AlfPLERZF)
# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
df_list <- lapply(df_list, add_new_columns)
# Access the modified dataframes in df_list
TotLERXS <- df_list[[1]]
TotLERYS <- df_list[[2]]
TotLERZS <- df_list[[3]]
TotLERXF <- df_list[[4]]
TotLERYF<- df_list[[5]]
TotLERZF<- df_list[[6]]
IWGPLERXS<- df_list[[7]]
IWGPLERYS<- df_list[[8]]
IWGPLERZS<- df_list[[9]]
IWGPLERXF<- df_list[[10]]
IWGPLERYF<- df_list[[11]]
IWGPLERZF<- df_list[[12]]
AlfPLERXS<- df_list[[13]]
AlfPLERYS<- df_list[[14]]
AlfPLERZS<- df_list[[15]]
AlfPLERXF<- df_list[[16]]
AlfPLERYF<- df_list[[17]]
AlfPLERZF<- df_list[[18]]
```

#Year 1 Summer Total LERs model 
```{r}
TotLERXS$N<-TotLERXS$NRATE
TotLERXS$N<- as.numeric(TotLERXS$N)
#linear
modTotLERXS<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERXS)
anova(modTotLERXS)
#check assumptions 
TotLERXS_resid<-resid(modTotLERXS)
qqnorm(TotLERXS_resid)
qqline(TotLERXS_resid)
plot(modTotLERXS)
#Logtransform
modTotLERXS1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERXS)
anova(modTotLERXS1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
TotLERXS_resid1<-resid(modTotLERXS1)
qqnorm(TotLERXS_resid1)
qqline(TotLERXS_resid1)
plot(modTotLERXS1)

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERXS, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "XS Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
  
#linear plots by location
TotLERXS$predicted <- predict(modTotLERXS1, newdata = TotLERXS, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERXS, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#TWO way emmeans
TotLERXS1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS2("modTotLERXS1")
seeee<-emmeans(modTotLERXS1, ~P,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response")
#Pairwise N 
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERXS1, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXSTLERN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXSTLERN $response <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSTLERN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSTLERN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXSTLERN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXSTLERN <- cld_dataNXSTLERN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXSTLERN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXSTLERN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

#Year 1 Fall Total LERs model
```{r}
TotLERXF$NRATE<- as.numeric(TotLERXF$NRATE)
modTotLERXF<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERXF)
anova(modTotLERXF)
summary(modTotLERXF)
#check assumptions 
TotLERXF_resid<-resid(modTotLERXF)
qqnorm(TotLERXF_resid)
qqline(TotLERXF_resid)
plot(modTotLERXF)
#Logtransform
modTotLERXF1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERXF)
anova(modTotLERXF1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER)
TotLERXF_resid1<-resid(modTotLERXF1)
qqnorm(TotLERXF_resid1)
qqline(TotLERXF_resid1)
plot(modTotLERXF1)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERXF, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "XF Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_boxplot_XF   775x630

max(TotLERXF$LER)
#linear plots
TotLERXF$predicted <- predict(modTotLERXF1, newdata = TotLERXF, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERXF, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 1 F Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 6.2) + # upper limit set by max(TotLERXF$LER)
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")+  #legend for colors
geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_Nrate_yr1F

#TWO way emmeans
TotLERXF1emm <- compute_emmeansNXF2("modTotLERXF1")

#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modTotLERXF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataTLERXFP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataTLERXFP $response <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERXFP$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERXFP$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataTLERXFP ) <- NULL
cld_dataTLERXFP <- cld_dataTLERXFP  %>%
  select( P, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataTLERXFP ) <- c( "Site", "TLER","CI2.5%","CI97.5%", "Group")
cld_dataTLERXFP   |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/TLER_emmP_yr1F  250x245

# Boxplot for Total LER by E
TotLERXF$predicted <- predict(modTotLERXF1, newdata = TotLERXF, re.form = NA)
LERemmsP <- emmeans(modTotLERXF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(LERemmsP)
cld_dataLERP <- cld(LERemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataLERP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
LEREXF <- ggplot(TotLERXF, aes(x = P, y = LER)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -15, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 1 Fall Total LER by Location", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
# save figures/Paper/TLER_boxplot_E_XF   720x742




#Pairwise N 
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERXF1, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXFTLERN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXFTLERN $response <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFTLERN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFTLERN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXFTLERN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXFTLERN <- cld_dataNXFTLERN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXFTLERN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXFTLERN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

#Year 2 summer total LERs model
```{r}
# remove outlier from MN 160 ; has an LER of 15.3803089 becuase plot 1309 has a PlotTotForageKgHa value of 37.62429
#TotLERYS_2 <- TotLERYS[-c(70), ] # this is the row with the outlier 

TotLERYS_2$NRATE<- as.numeric(TotLERYS_2$NRATE)
modTotLERYS_2<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERYS_2)
anova(modTotLERYS_2)
#check assumptions 
TotLERYS_2_resid<-resid(modTotLERYS_2)
qqnorm(TotLERYS_2_resid)
qqline(TotLERYS_2_resid)
plot(modTotLERYS_2)
#Logtransform
modTotLERYS_21<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERYS_2)
anova(modTotLERYS_21)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
TotLERYS_2_resid1<-resid(modTotLERYS_21)
qqnorm(TotLERYS_2_resid1)
qqline(TotLERYS_2_resid1)
plot(modTotLERYS_21)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERYS_2, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    labs(title = "YS Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
    geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_boxplot_YS   775x630

max(TotLERYS_2$LER, na.rm = T)
#linear plots
TotLERYS_2$predicted <- predict(modTotLERYS_21, newdata = TotLERYS_2, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERYS_2, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 S Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")+  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_Nrate_yr2S

#Pairwise N
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERYS_21, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataTLERYSN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataTLERYSN $response <- format(cld_dataTLERYSN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERYSN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERYSN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERYSN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERYSN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataTLERYSN ) <- NULL
cld_dataTLERYSN <- cld_dataTLERYSN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataTLERYSN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataTLERYSN   |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/TLER_emmE_yr2S

#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modTotLERYS_21,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modTotLERYS_21, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
# write.csv(new_df, 'data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_TLER_yr2S.csv')

# N rate across location 
ggplot(TotLERYS_2, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
  geom_point(color='black') + #geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=TotLERYS_2, fun=~1.35*exp(-0.0017*.x),color='black')+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 2 Summer Relationship between Total LER and N-rate \nbacktransformed for visualization") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 3.5) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 10, y = 3.2, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 3.2, label = plvl),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18)) #change font size of axis titles
# save figures/Paper/TLER_Nrate_N_yr2S  900x795
```

#Year 2 fall total LERs model
```{r}
TotLERYF$NRATE<- as.numeric(TotLERYF$NRATE)
modTotLERYF<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERYF)
anova(modTotLERYF)
summary(modTotLERYF)
#check assumptions 
TotLERYF_resid<-resid(modTotLERYF)
qqnorm(TotLERYF_resid)
qqline(TotLERYF_resid)
plot(modTotLERYF)
#Logtransform
modTotLERYF1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERYF)
anova(modTotLERYF1)
#check assumptions logtransform
TotLERYF_resid1<-resid(modTotLERYF1)
qqnorm(TotLERYF_resid1)
qqline(TotLERYF_resid1)
plot(modTotLERYF1)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERYF, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    labs(title = "YF Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
    geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_boxplot_YF   775x630

max(TotLERYF$LER)
#linear plots
TotLERYF$predicted <- predict(modTotLERYF1, newdata = TotLERYF, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERYF, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 F Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 6.9) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")+  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_Nrate_yr2F

#TWO way emmeans
TotLERYF1emm <- compute_emmeansNYF2("modTotLERYF1")

#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modTotLERYF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataTLERYFP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataTLERYFP $response <- format(cld_dataTLERYFP $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERYFP$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERYFP$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERYFP$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERYFP$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataTLERYFP ) <- NULL
cld_dataTLERYFP <- cld_dataTLERYFP  %>%
  select( P, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataTLERYFP ) <- c( "Site", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataTLERYFP   |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/TLER_emmP_yr2F

# Boxplot for Total LER by E
TotLERYF$predicted <- predict(modTotLERYF1, newdata = TotLERYF, re.form = NA)
LERemmsP <- emmeans(modTotLERYF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(LERemmsP)
cld_dataLERP <- cld(LERemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataLERP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
LEREYF <- ggplot(TotLERYF, aes(x = P, y = LER)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -15, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall Total LER by Location", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
# save figures/Paper/TLER_boxplot_E_YF   720x742



#Pairwise N 
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERYF1, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNYFTLERN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYFTLERN $response <- format(cld_dataNYFTLERN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYFTLERN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNYFTLERN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYFTLERN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNYFTLERN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNYFTLERN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNYFTLERN <- cld_dataNYFTLERN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYFTLERN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNYFTLERN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

#Year 3 Summer Total LERs model 
```{r}
TotLERZS$N<-TotLERZS$NRATE
TotLERZS$N<- as.numeric(TotLERZS$N)
#linear
modTotLERZS<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERZS)
anova(modTotLERZS)
#check assumptions 
TotLERZS_resid<-resid(modTotLERZS)
qqnorm(TotLERZS_resid)
qqline(TotLERZS_resid)
plot(modTotLERZS)
#Logtransform
modTotLERZS1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERZS)
anova(modTotLERZS1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
TotLERZS_resid1<-resid(modTotLERZS1)
qqnorm(TotLERZS_resid1)
qqline(TotLERZS_resid1)
plot(modTotLERZS1)
```

# Total LERs anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modTotLERXS1)
tableTLERXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableTLERXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_TLERXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modTotLERXF1)
tableTLERXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableTLERXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_TLERXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modTotLERYS_21) 
tableTLERYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%

                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableTLERYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_TLERYS

                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%

                    )%>%

print(tableTLERYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_TLERYF

aov.tableZS <- anova(modTotLERZS1)
tableTLERZS = flextable(data = aov.tableZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>%

aov.tableZF <- anova(modTotLERZF1)
tableTLERZF = flextable(data = aov.tableZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>%

                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",

                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",

# save figures/forage/gt_TLERZF


my_modelsNG <- list(modTotLERXS1, modTotLERXF1, modTotLERYS_21, modTotLERYF1, modTotLERZS1, modTotLERZF1)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall", "Year 3 Summer", "Year 3 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("log", "log", "log", "log", "log", "log"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_TLER.png", expand = 10)
```

# LER E XF YF

```{r}
#LEREXF

LERcomboplotEXFYF <- ggarrange(LEREXF, LEREYF, ncol=2)
```

## Competitive Ratio of IWG

(PLER IWG / PLER Alf ) * seeding rate ratio
our seeding rate ratio is 50/50 so the term is 1

# Competitive Ratio Calculation
```{r}
# SW0, SW40, SW80, SW120, SW160
CRresultsNdSWALL <- LERresultsNdSWALL %>%
  select(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest, PartialLERIWGSW0, TotalLERSW0, PartialLERIWGSW40, TotalLERSW40, PartialLERIWGSW80, TotalLERSW80, PartialLERIWGSW120, TotalLERSW120, PartialLERIWGSW160, TotalLERSW160)%>%
  mutate(CRSW0 = PartialLERIWGSW0 / TotalLERSW0)%>%
  mutate(CRSW40 = PartialLERIWGSW40 / TotalLERSW40)%>%
  mutate(CRSW80 = PartialLERIWGSW80 / TotalLERSW80)%>%
  mutate(CRSW120 = PartialLERIWGSW120 / TotalLERSW120)%>%
  mutate(CRSW160 = PartialLERIWGSW160 / TotalLERSW160)%>%
  select(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest, CRSW0, CRSW40, CRSW80, CRSW120, CRSW160)
```

# Competitive Ratio Compile data
```{r}
#Rearrange dataframe
CRresultsNdSWALL_long <- CRresultsNdSWALL %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("CRSW"),
               names_to = "Nrate",
               values_to = "CR")

#try to make the dataframe more usable

#cut off total and partial 
CRresultsNdSWALL_long$Type <- sub("^(CR)", "", CRresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)
#LERresultsNdSWALL_long$tot_or_part <- sub("^(Partial|Total).*", "\\1", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)

#cut off SW
CRresultsNdSWALL_long$NRATE <- sub("^(SW|SW|SW)", "", CRresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)
CRresultsNdSWALL_long$PlotType <- sub("^(CRSW|CRSW|CRSW).*", "\\1", CRresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)

#get rid of pesky NA results (caused by missing plots inherent in year 1 KS summer data)
CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA<- na.omit(CRresultsNdSWALL_long)

CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE<-as.numeric(CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE)

#includes total and partial until it doesn't...used for some pairwise comparison thingy. 
CRResultsAllX<-CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'X',]
CRResultsAllY<-CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Y',]
CRResultsAllZ<-CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[CRresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Z',]
CRResultsAllXS<-CRResultsAllX[CRResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
CRResultsAllXF<-CRResultsAllX[CRResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
CRResultsAllYS<-CRResultsAllY[CRResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
CRResultsAllYF<-CRResultsAllY[CRResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
CRResultsAllZS<-CRResultsAllZ[CRResultsAllZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
CRResultsAllZF<-CRResultsAllZ[CRResultsAllZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]

#rename variables in dataframes to make life easier 
# Function to add new columns to a dataframe
add_new_columns <- function(df) {
  df$N <- df$NRATE
  return(df)
}

# List of dataframes (replace these with your actual dataframes)
df_list <- list(CRResultsAllXS, CRResultsAllXF, 
                CRResultsAllYS, CRResultsAllYF, 
                CRResultsAllZS, CRResultsAllZF)

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
df_list <- lapply(df_list, add_new_columns)
# Access the modified dataframes in df_list
CRXS <- df_list[[1]]
CRXF <- df_list[[2]]
CRYS <- df_list[[3]]
CRYF <- df_list[[4]]
CRZS <- df_list[[5]]
CRZF <- df_list[[6]]
```

#Year 1 Summer Competitive Ratio model 
```{r}
CRXS$N<-CRXS$NRATE
CRXS$N<- as.numeric(CRXS$N)
#linear
modCRXS<-lmer(CR~N*P + (1|Rep), data= CRXS)
anova(modCRXS)
#check assumptions 
CRXS_resid<-resid(modCRXS)
qqnorm(CRXS_resid)
qqline(CRXS_resid)
plot(modCRXS)
#Logtransform
modCRXS1<-lmer(log(CR)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=CRXS)
anova(modCRXS1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
CRXS_resid1<-resid(modCRXS1)
qqnorm(CRXS_resid1)
qqline(CRXS_resid1)
plot(modCRXS1)

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for CR
ggplot(CRXS, aes(x = P, y = CR, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Year 1 Summer IWG Competitive Ratio by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total CR")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/CR_boxplot_XS 

#linear plots by location
CRXS$predicted <- predict(modCRXS1, newdata = CRXS, re.form = NA)
ggplot(CRXS, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#TWO way emmeans
CRXS1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS2("modCRXS1")
seeee<-emmeans(modCRXS1, ~P,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response")
#Pairwise P 
emmsN <- emmeans(modCRXS1, specs = ~ P, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXSCRN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXSCRN $response <- format(cld_dataNXSCRN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSCRN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSCRN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSCRN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSCRN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXSCRN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXSCRN <- cld_dataNXSCRN  %>%
  select( P, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXSCRN ) <- c( "P", "CR","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXSCRN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save CR_emmE_yr1S

# Boxplot for Competitive Ratio by E
CRXS$predicted <- predict(modCRXS1, newdata = CRXS, re.form = NA)
CRemmsP <- emmeans(modCRXS1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CRemmsP)
cld_dataCRP <- cld(CRemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCRP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Kansas", "Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CREXS <- ggplot(CRXS, aes(x = P, y = CR)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  labs(title = "Year 1 Summer", x = "Environment", y = "Competitive Ratio")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```

#Year 1 Fall Competitive Ratio model 
```{r}
CRXF$N<-CRXF$NRATE
CRXF$N<- as.numeric(CRXF$N)
#linear
modCRXF<-lmer(CR~N*P + (1|Rep), data= CRXF)
anova(modCRXF)
#check assumptions 
CRXF_resid<-resid(modCRXF)
qqnorm(CRXF_resid)
qqline(CRXF_resid)
plot(modCRXF)
#Logtransform
modCRXF1<-lmer(log(CR)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=CRXF)
anova(modCRXF1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
CRXF_resid1<-resid(modCRXF1)
qqnorm(CRXF_resid1)
qqline(CRXF_resid1)
plot(modCRXF1)

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots

ggplot(CRXF, aes(x = P, y = CR, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Year 1 Fall IWG Competitive Ratio by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total CR")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")

ggplot(CRXF, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#TWO way emmeans
CRXF1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS2("modCRXF1")
seeee<-emmeans(modCRXF1, ~P,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response")
#Pairwise P 
emmsN <- emmeans(modCRXF1, specs = ~ P, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXFCRN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXFCRN $response <- format(cld_dataNXFCRN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFCRN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFCRN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFCRN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFCRN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXFCRN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXFCRN <- cld_dataNXFCRN  %>%
  select( P, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXFCRN ) <- c( "P", "CR","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXFCRN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save CR_emmE_yr1F


# Boxplot for Competitive Ratio by E
CRXF$predicted <- predict(modCRXF1, newdata = CRXF, re.form = NA)
CRemmsP <- emmeans(modCRXF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CRemmsP)
cld_dataCRP <- cld(CRemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCRP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CREXF <- ggplot(CRXF, aes(x = P, y = CR)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  labs(title = "Year 1 Fall", x = "Environment", y = "Competitive Ratio")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```

#Year 2 Summer Competitive Ratio model 
```{r}
CRYS$N<-CRYS$NRATE
CRYS$N<- as.numeric(CRYS$N)
#linear
modCRYS<-lmer(CR~N*P + (1|Rep), data= CRYS)
anova(modCRYS)
#check assumptions 
CRYS_resid<-resid(modCRYS)
qqnorm(CRYS_resid)
qqline(CRYS_resid)
plot(modCRYS)
#Logtransform
modCRYS1<-lmer(log(CR+0.00001)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=CRYS)
anova(modCRYS1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
CRYS_resid1<-resid(modCRYS1)
qqnorm(CRYS_resid1)
qqline(CRYS_resid1)
plot(modCRYS1)
#using normal

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for CR
ggplot(CRYS, aes(x = P, y = CR, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Year 2 Summer IWG Competitive Ratio by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total CR")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/CR_boxplot_YS 

#linear plots by location
CRYS$predicted <- predict(modCRYS, newdata = CRYS, re.form = NA)
ggplot(CRYS, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "IWG Competitive Ratio") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#save CR_Nrate_yr2S

#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modCRYS,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modCRYS, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend), SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x), percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_CR_yr2S.csv")

# N rate across location 
CRNYS <- ggplot(CRYS, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
  geom_point(color='black') + #geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  # Function taken from new_df calculation above 
  geom_function(data=CRYS, fun=~0.54+(0.0007*.x),color='black')+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "IWG Competitive Ratio") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 2 Summer Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 10, y = 1.1, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 1.1, label = plvl),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18)) #change font size of axis titles
CRNYS




#TWO way emmeans
CRYS1emm <- compute_emmeansNYS2("modCRYS")
seeee<-emmeans(modCRYS, ~P,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response")
#Pairwise N 
CRYS$N <- factor(CRYS$N)
modCRYS2 <- lmer(CR~N*P + (1|Rep), data= CRYS) 
# this makes N no longer sig (diff is N as continuous vs a factor (factor necessary for pairwise))
emmsN <- emmeans(modCRYS, ~ N)
cld_dataNYSCRN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYSCRN$emmean <- format(cld_dataNYSCRN$emmean, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYSCRN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNYSCRN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYSCRN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNYSCRN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNYSCRN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNYSCRN <- cld_dataNYSCRN  %>%
  select( N, emmean, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYSCRN ) <- c( "N", "CR","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNYSCRN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

#Year 2 Fall Competitive Ratio model 
```{r}
CRYF$N<-CRYF$NRATE
CRYF$N<- as.numeric(CRYF$N)
#linear
modCRYF<-lmer(CR~N*P + (1|Rep), data= CRYF)
anova(modCRYF)
#check assumptions

qqnorm(CRYF_resid)
qqline(CRYF_resid)
plot(modCRYF)
#Logtransform

anova(modCRYF1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
CRYS_resid1<-resid(modCRYF1)
qqnorm(CRYS_resid1)
qqline(CRYS_resid1)
plot(modCRYF1)
# using normal 

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for CR
ggplot(CRYF, aes(x = P, y = CR, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall IWG Competitive Ratio by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total CR")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/CR_boxplot_YF 

#linear plots by location
CRYF$predicted <- predict(modCRYF, newdata = CRYF, re.form = NA)
ggplot(CRYF, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, (predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "IWG Competitive Ratio") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#save CR_Nrate_yr2F

#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modCRYF,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modCRYF, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend), SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x), percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_CR_yr2F.csv")

#Pairwise P 
emmsP <- emmeans(modCRYF, specs = ~ P, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNYFCRN <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYFCRN $emmean <- format(cld_dataNYFCRN $emmean, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYFCRN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNYFCRN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNYFCRN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNYFCRN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNYFCRN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNYFCRN <- cld_dataNYFCRN  %>%
  select( P, emmean, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYFCRN ) <- c( "P", "CR","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNYFCRN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save CR_emmP_yr2F

# Boxplot for Competitive Ratio by E
CRYF$predicted <- predict(modCRYF, newdata = CRYF, re.form = NA)
CRemmsP <- emmeans(modCRYF, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CRemmsP)
cld_dataCRP <- cld(CRemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCRP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CREYF <- ggplot(CRYF, aes(x = P, y = CR)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
          color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall", x = "Environment", y = "Competitive Ratio")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

# N rate across location 
CRNYF <- ggplot(CRYF, aes(x = N, y = CR)) +
  geom_point(color='black') + #geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  # Function taken from new_df calculation above 
  geom_function(data=CRYF, fun=~0.48+(0.0011*.x),color='black')+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "IWG Competitive Ratio") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall Relationship between IWG Competitive Ratio and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 1.2) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "longdash")+
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 10, y = 1.1, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 1.1, label = plvl),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18)) #change font size of axis titles
CRNYF
```

```{r}
#linear

anova(modCRZS)
#check assumptions

qqnorm(CRZS_resid)
qqline(CRZS_resid)
plot(modCRZS)
#Logtransform
modCRZS1<-lmer(log(CR)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=CRZS)
anova(modCRZS1)
#check assumptions logtransform 
CRZS_resid1<-resid(modCRZS1)
qqnorm(CRZS_resid1)
qqline(CRZS_resid1)
plot(modCRZS1)
# using normal

mean(CRZS$CR)
sd(CRZS$CR)
```

# Competitive Ratio anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modCRXS1)
tableCRXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCRXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_CRXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modCRXF1)
tableCRXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCRXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_CRXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modCRYS) 
tableCRYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCRYS)

print(tableCRYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_CRYF

aov.tableZS <- anova(modCRZS)
tableCRZS = flextable(data = aov.tableZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",

print(tableCRZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_CRZS 

aov.tableZF <- anova(modCRZF)
tableCRZF = flextable(data = aov.tableZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCRZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_TLERZF


my_modelsNG <- list(modCRXS1, modCRXF1, modCRYS, modCRYF, modCRZS, modCRZF)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall", "Year 3 Summer", "Year 3 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("log", "log", "linear", "linear", "linear", "linear"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_CR.png", expand = 10)
```
