## Forage Quality

checking model fit for total CP and total RFV
copying Megan's code over from IWG-Alf Data Analysis THESIS Edition

#N RFV calculations 
```{r}
#IWG 
NdXSI$IWGRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdXSI$IWGADF)) * (120 / NdXSI$IWGaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdXFI$IWGRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdXFI$IWGADF)) * (120 / NdXFI$IWGaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdYSI$IWGRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdYSI$IWGADF)) * (120 / NdYSI$IWGaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdYFI$IWGRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdYFI$IWGADF)) * (120 / NdYFI$IWGaNDF) ) / 1.29


#REMOVE outliers KSY314I, KSY315I
#NdYSI<-NdYSI[-107,]
#NdYSI<-NdYSI[-107,]

#make big df for deltas 
NdXSIdf <- NdXSI %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, IWGRFV)
NdXFIdf <- NdXFI %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, IWGRFV)
NdYSIdf <- NdYSI %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, IWGRFV)
NdYFIdf <- NdYFI %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, IWGRFV)
NRFVIdf<-bind_rows(NdXSIdf, NdXFIdf)
NRFVIdf<-bind_rows(NRFVIdf, NdYSIdf)
NRFVIdf<-bind_rows(NRFVIdf, NdYFIdf)

#Alf
NdXSA$ALFaNDF<-as.numeric(NdXSA$ALFaNDF)
NdXFA$ALFaNDF<-as.numeric(NdXFA$ALFaNDF)
NdYSA$ALFaNDF<-as.numeric(NdYSA$ALFaNDF)
NdYFA$ALFaNDF<-as.numeric(NdYFA$ALFaNDF)

NdXSA$ALFRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdXSA$ALFADF)) * (120 / NdXSA$ALFaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdXFA$ALFRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdXFA$ALFADF)) * (120 / NdXFA$ALFaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdYSA$ALFRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdYSA$ALFADF)) * (120 / NdYSA$ALFaNDF) ) / 1.29
NdYFA$ALFRFV<-((88.9 - (0.779 * NdYFA$ALFADF)) * (120 / NdYFA$ALFaNDF) ) / 1.29

#REMOVE outliers KSX202A missing, KSX209A
#NdXSA<-NdXSA[-88,]
#NdXSA<-NdXSA[-92,]

#REMOVE NYS212A, NYS215A, NYS217A, NYS219A, NYS220A, NYS223A, NYS304A (some already gone... maybe a variety thing)
#NdYSA<-NdYSA[-17,]
#NdYSA<-NdYSA[-18,]
#NdYSA<-NdYSA[-19,]

#make big df for deltas 
NdXSAdf <- NdXSA %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, ALFRFV)
NdXFAdf <- NdXFA %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, ALFRFV)
NdYSAdf <- NdYSA %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, ALFRFV)
NdYFAdf <- NdYFA %>%
  select(YearCode, Rep, P, CROP, N, Harvest, ALFRFV)
NRFVAdf<-bind_rows(NdXSAdf, NdXFAdf)
NRFVAdf<-bind_rows(NRFVAdf, NdYSAdf)
NRFVAdf<-bind_rows(NRFVAdf, NdYFAdf)
```

#making proportion stuff for total FQ CP and RFV 
```{r}
#NEEDS TO JUST BE INTERCROPPED PLOTS BUT LIKE ALSO NEED TO COMPARE INTERCROP TO MONOCULTURE SOO LIKE .... WUT 
#make proportions
NdXSI$propI<-((NdXSI$PlotIWGDryKgHa)/(NdXSI$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdXFI$propI<-((NdXFI$PlotIWGDryKgHa)/(NdXFI$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdYSI$propI<-((NdYSI$PlotIWGDryKgHa)/(NdYSI$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdYFI$propI<-((NdYFI$PlotIWGDryKgHa)/(NdYFI$PlotTotForageKgHa))

NdXSA$propA<-((NdXSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)/(NdXSA$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdXFA$propA<-((NdXFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)/(NdXFA$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdYSA$propA<-((NdYSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)/(NdYSA$PlotTotForageKgHa))
NdYFA$propA<-((NdYFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)/(NdYFA$PlotTotForageKgHa))

#make adjusted CP values 
NdXSI$propCPI<-(NdXSI$IWGCP)*(NdXSI$propI)
NdXFI$propCPI<-(NdXFI$IWGCP)*(NdXFI$propI)
NdYSI$propCPI<-(NdYSI$IWGCP)*(NdYSI$propI)
NdYFI$propCPI<-(NdYFI$IWGCP)*(NdYFI$propI)

NdXSA$propCPA<-(NdXSA$ALFCP)*(NdXSA$propA)
NdXFA$propCPA<-(NdXFA$ALFCP)*(NdXFA$propA)
NdYSA$propCPA<-(NdYSA$ALFCP)*(NdYSA$propA)
NdYFA$propCPA<-(NdYFA$ALFCP)*(NdYFA$propA)

#Somehow make CP totals
  #XS
NdXSj<- NdXSI %>%
  select(propCPI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXSk<- NdXSA %>%
  select(propCPA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXSf<- merge(NdXSj, NdXSk, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdXSf[is.na(NdXSf)] <- 0
NdXSf$totCP<-((NdXSf$propCPI)+(NdXSf$propCPA))
  #XF
NdXFj<- NdXFI %>%
  select(propCPI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXFk<- NdXFA %>%
  select(propCPA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXFf<- merge(NdXFj, NdXFk, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdXFf[is.na(NdXFf)] <- 0
NdXFf$totCP<-((NdXFf$propCPI)+(NdXFf$propCPA))
  #YS
NdYSj<- NdYSI %>%
  select(propCPI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYSk<- NdYSA %>%
  select(propCPA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYSf<- merge(NdYSj, NdYSk, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdYSf[is.na(NdYSf)] <- 0
NdYSf$totCP<-((NdYSf$propCPI)+(NdYSf$propCPA))
  #YF
NdYFj<- NdYFI %>%
  select(propCPI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYFk<- NdYFA %>%
  select(propCPA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYFf<- merge(NdYFj, NdYFk, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdYFf[is.na(NdYFf)] <- 0
NdYFf$totCP<-((NdYFf$propCPI)+(NdYFf$propCPA))


#make adjusted RFV values 
NdXSI$propRFVI<-(NdXSI$IWGRFV)*(NdXSI$propI)
NdXFI$propRFVI<-(NdXFI$IWGRFV)*(NdXFI$propI)
NdYSI$propRFVI<-(NdYSI$IWGRFV)*(NdYSI$propI)
NdYFI$propRFVI<-(NdYFI$IWGRFV)*(NdYFI$propI)

NdXSA$propRFVA<-(NdXSA$ALFRFV)*(NdXSA$propA)
NdXFA$propRFVA<-(NdXFA$ALFRFV)*(NdXFA$propA)
NdYSA$propRFVA<-(NdYSA$ALFRFV)*(NdYSA$propA)
NdYFA$propRFVA<-(NdYFA$ALFRFV)*(NdYFA$propA)

#Somehow make RFV totals
  #XS
NdXSm<- NdXSI %>%
  select(propRFVI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXSn<- NdXSA %>%
  select(propRFVA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXSo<- merge(NdXSm, NdXSn, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdXSo[is.na(NdXSo)] <- 0
NdXSo$totRFV<-((NdXSo$propRFVI)+(NdXSo$propRFVA))
  #XF
NdXFm<- NdXFI %>%
  select(propRFVI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXFn<- NdXFA %>%
  select(propRFVA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdXFo<- merge(NdXFm, NdXFn, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdXFo[is.na(NdXFo)] <- 0
NdXFo$totRFV<-((NdXFo$propRFVI)+(NdXFo$propRFVA))
  #YS
NdYSm<- NdYSI %>%
  select(propRFVI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYSn<- NdYSA %>%
  select(propRFVA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYSo<- merge(NdYSm, NdYSn, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdYSo[is.na(NdYSo)] <- 0
NdYSo$totRFV<-((NdYSo$propRFVI)+(NdYSo$propRFVA))
  #YF
NdYFm<- NdYFI %>%
  select(propRFVI, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYFn<- NdYFA %>%
  select(propRFVA, N, P, CROP, Plot, Harvest, YearCode, Rep)
NdYFo<- merge(NdYFm, NdYFn, by = c("N", "P", "CROP", "Plot", "Harvest", "YearCode", "Rep"), all = TRUE)
NdYFo[is.na(NdYFo)] <- 0
NdYFo$totRFV<-((NdYFo$propRFVI)+(NdYFo$propRFVA))
```

#Total CP year 1 summer
```{r}
#REMOVE row with 0 for totCP
#NdXSf1<-NdXSf[-47,]
# compare models
modNTCPXS<-lmer(totCP~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXSf1)
anova(modNTCPXS)
#check assumptions 
NTCPXS_resid<-resid(modNTCPXS)
qqnorm(NTCPXS_resid)
qqline(NTCPXS_resid)
plot(modNTCPXS)
#try log 
#Remove annoying lines with 0 values 
modNTCPXS1<-lmer(log(totCP)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXSf1)
anova(modNTCPXS1)
#check assumptions 
NTCPXS_resid1<-resid(modNTCPXS1)
qqnorm(NTCPXS_resid1)
qqline(NTCPXS_resid1)
plot(modNTCPXS1)
# normal is better for normality, no difference in significance

#N:E:C
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
# Define the desired order of 'P'
NdXSf1$P <- factor(NdXSf1$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultX<-emtrends(modNTCPXS,~ N*P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfX <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultX)
  emtrends_dfX$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))  
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfX$PC <- paste0(emtrends_dfX$P,emtrends_dfX$CROP)
  emtrends_dfX$P <- factor(emtrends_dfX$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsX<-emmeans(modNTCPXS, ~N*P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_dfX <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsX)
emmeans_dfX$PC <- paste0(emmeans_dfX$P,emmeans_dfX$CROP)
mergedX <- emtrends_dfX %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfX, by = c("PC")) %>%
  dplyr::select(PC, P.x, CROP.x, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
  colnames(mergedX)[2] <- "P"
  colnames(mergedX)[3] <- "CROP"
mergedX$P <- factor(mergedX$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
X_df <- mergedX %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedX <- X_df %>%
  arrange(P)
sortedX_I <- subset(sortedX, CROP== "inter")
sortedX_A <- subset(sortedX, CROP== "monoA")
sortedX_M <- subset(sortedX, CROP== "monoI")

sym_I <- sortedX_I %>%
  distinct(P, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 24
  )
sym_A <- sortedX_A %>%
  distinct(P, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 23
  )
sym_M <- sortedX_M %>%
  distinct(P, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 22
  )
#plot
CPcomboplotNECXS <- ggplot(data=NdXSf1) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSf1, aes(x = N, y = totCP, shape = CROP)) +
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "KS" & CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~8.73+(0.0065*.x), color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "KS" & CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~12.35+(0.0017*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "KS" & CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~4.84+(0.0112*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "MN" & CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~14.29+(0.0087*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "MN" & CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~18.84+(0.0015*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "MN" & CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~8.95+(0.0213*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "NY" & CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~11.21+(-0.0234*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "NY" & CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~12.88+(0.0066*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "NY" & CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~1.75+(0.0097*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "WI" & CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~4.17+(0.0028*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "WI" & CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~12.60+(-0.0033*.x),color='darkgrey')+  
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSf1, P== "WI" & CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~0.89+(0.0107*.x),color='darkgrey')+  
  geom_text(data = sortedX_I, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 24, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedX_A, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 23, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedX_M, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 22, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 25, size = 1, fill = "lightgrey", stroke = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 24, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 23, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_M, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 22, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure

  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted", monoI = "dashed", monoI = "dashed")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                     labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 25, 4, 1, 25))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Crude Protien", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 25) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(KS='Kansas', MN='Minnesota',
                                      NY='New York', WI='Wisconsin')))+
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
print(CPcomboplotNECXS)
# ggsave("figures/Paper/CPcomboplotNECXS.jpg", plot = CPcomboplotNECXS, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)



#Pairwise NPC
emmsNPC <- emmeans(modNTCPXS, ~ N*P*CROP,at= list(N = N_levels)) 
cld_dataNTCPXSNPC <- cld(emmsNPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNTCPXSNPC$response <- format(cld_dataNTCPXSNPC$emmean, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNTCPXSNPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNTCPXSNPC<- cld_dataNTCPXSNPC %>%
  select(N, P, CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNTCPXSNPC) <- c("N", "Site", "Cropping System", "Total CP", "Group")
cld_dataNTCPXSNPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#This gives us the slope for each interactions as well as a P value indicating significance level for that slope
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTCPXS,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
  #view(emtrends_df)
emtrends(modNTCPXS,~ P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends(modNTCPXS,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)

#emmeans for intercepts! via erika
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTCPXS,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTCPXS, ~P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("P", "CROP")) %>%
  select(P, CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
view(merged_df)
merged_df$P <- factor(merged_df$P, levels = c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoI","monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange(P, CROP)
view(sorted_df)
```

#Total CP year 1 fall
```{r}
# compare models
modNTCPXF<-lmer(totCP~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFf)
anova(modNTCPXF)
#check assumptions 
NTCPXF_resid<-resid(modNTCPXF)
qqnorm(NTCPXF_resid)
qqline(NTCPXF_resid)
plot(modNTCPXF)
#try log 
modNTCPXF1<-lmer(log(totCP)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFf)
anova(modNTCPXF1)
#check assumptions 
NTCPXF_resid1<-resid(modNTCPXF1)
qqnorm(NTCPXF_resid1)
qqline(NTCPXF_resid1)
plot(modNTCPXF1)
# models equal, use linear to match other timepoints

# equations and plot N:C
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTCPXF,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))    
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTCPXF, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA", "monoI"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sorted_df2
sorted_I <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "inter")
sorted_A <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoA")
sorted_M <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoI")
sym_I <- sorted_I %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 29
  )
sym_A <- sorted_A %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 28
  )
sym_M <- sorted_M %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 27
  )
# N rate across C 
CPNCXF <- ggplot(data=NdXFf) +
  geom_point(data = NdXFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, shape = CROP)) +
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~18.83+(0.0033*.x), color='#2F2F2F')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~19.50+(-0.0025*.x), color='#2F2F2F')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~14.03+(-0.0059*.x), color='#2F2F2F')+
  ggtitle("Year 1 Fall \nRelationship between Crude Protien and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 30) +
  geom_text(data = sorted_I, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 29, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_A, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 28, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_M, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 27, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 25, size = 1, fill = "lightgrey", stroke = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 29, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 28, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_M, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 27, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted", monoI = "dashed", monoI = "dashed")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 25, 4, 1, 25))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Crude Protien", shape = "Cropping System") +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
CPNCXF
# save figures/Paper/CPNCXF   970x790

#N:E
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
NdXFf$P <- factor(NdXFf$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultX<-emtrends(modNTCPXF,~ N*P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfX <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultX)
  emtrends_dfX$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfX$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfX$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
  emtrends_dfX$P <- factor(emtrends_dfX$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsX<-emmeans(modNTCPXF, ~N*P, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfX <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsX)
mergedX <- emtrends_dfX %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfX, by = c("P")) %>%
  dplyr::select(P, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
mergedX$P <- factor(mergedX$P, levels = c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
X_df <- mergedX %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedX <- X_df %>%
  arrange(P)
#plot
CPcomboplotNEXF <- ggplot(data=NdXFf) +
  geom_point(data = NdXFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 25) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(KS='Kansas', MN='Minnesota',
                                      NY='New York', WI='Wisconsin'))) +
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "MN"), fun=~18.88+(-0.0000*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "NY"), fun=~18.93+(-0.0075*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "WI"), fun=~14.55+(0.0025*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 24, label = equation),  size=3)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = sortedX, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 24, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
# add stars to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
print(CPcomboplotNEXF)
# ggsave("figures/Paper/CPcomboplotNEXF.jpg", plot = CPcomboplotNEXF, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#figure E:C (YF)
NdXFf$predicted <- predict(modNTCPXF, newdata = NdXFf, re.form = NA)
CPemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTCPXF, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsPC)
cld_dataCPPC <- cld(CPemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CPXFPC<-ggplot(NdXFf, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Crude Protien") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.75)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(CPXFPC)
```

#Total CP year 2 summer
```{r}
#compare models
modNTCPYS<-lmer(totCP~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSf)
anova(modNTCPYS)
#check assumptions 
NTCPYS_resid<-resid(modNTCPYS)
qqnorm(NTCPYS_resid)
qqline(NTCPYS_resid)
plot(modNTCPYS)
plot(NTCPYS_resid)
#try log
modNTCPYS1<-lmer(log(totCP+0.00001)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSf)
anova(modNTCPYS1)
#check assumptions 
NTCPYS_resid1<-resid(modNTCPYS1)
qqnorm(NTCPYS_resid1)
qqline(NTCPYS_resid1)
plot(modNTCPYS1)
plot(NTCPYS_resid1)
# quadratic 
NdYSf$N2 <- NdYSf$N^2
modNTCPYS2 <- lmer(totCP ~ (N + I(N^2))*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data = NdYSf)
modNTCPYS3 <- lmer(totCP ~ N + I(N^2) + P*CROP + N:P + N:CROP + (1|Rep), data = NdYSf)
AICc(modNTCPYS2,modNTCPYS3) # modNTCPXS3 is lower AICc so prefered
NTCPYS_resid3<-resid(modNTCPYS3)
qqnorm(NTCPYS_resid3)
qqline(NTCPYS_resid3)
plot(modNTCPYS3)
plot(NTCPYS_resid3)
anova(modNTCPYS3)
#try sqrt
modNTCPYS4<-lmer(sqrt(totCP)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSf)
anova(modNTCPYS1)
#check assumptions 
NTCPYS_resid4<-resid(modNTCPYS4)
qqnorm(NTCPYS_resid4)
qqline(NTCPYS_resid4)
plot(modNTCPYS4)
plot(NTCPYS_resid4)
# decided to go with linear


# Boxplot for Total Forage by C
NdYSf$predicted <- predict(modNTCPYS, newdata = NdYSf, re.form = NA)
CPemmsC <- emmeans(modNTCPYS, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsC)
cld_dataCPC <- cld(CPemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Intercropping", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
CPCYS <- ggplot(NdYSf, aes(x = CROP, y = totCP)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = CROP, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Summer", x = "Cropping System", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

# Boxplot for Total Forage by E
NdYSf$predicted <- predict(modNTCPYS, newdata = NdYSf, re.form = NA)
CPemmsP <- emmeans(modNTCPYS, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsP)
cld_dataCPP <- cld(CPemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Kansas", "Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CPEYS <- ggplot(NdYSf, aes(x = P, y = totCP)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -29, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Summer Crude Protien by Location", x = "Location", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
```

```{r}
#compare models
modNTCPYF<-lmer(totCP~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFf)
anova(modNTCPYF)
#check assumptions 
NTCPYF_resid<-resid(modNTCPYF)

qqline(NTCPYF_resid)

CPemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTCPYF, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means

cld_dataCPPC <- cld(CPemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)

CPYFPC<-ggplot(NdYFf, aes(x = P, y = (predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Crude Protien") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.75)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 2 Fall")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(CPYFPC)

# Boxplot for Total Forage by C
NdYFf$predicted <- predict(modNTCPYF, newdata = NdYFf, re.form = NA)
CPemmsC <- emmeans(modNTCPYF, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsC)
cld_dataCPC <- cld(CPemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Intercropping", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
CPCYF <- ggplot(NdYFf, aes(x = CROP, y = totCP)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = CROP, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -10, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall", x = "Cropping SYFtem", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

# Boxplot for Total Forage by E
NdYFf$predicted <- predict(modNTCPYF, newdata = NdYFf, re.form = NA)
CPemmsP <- emmeans(modNTCPYF, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsP)
cld_dataCPP <- cld(CPemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
CPEYF <- ggplot(NdYFf, aes(x = P, y = totCP)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = emmean.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -18, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall Crude Protien by Location", x = "Location", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

#EQUATION table JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTCPYF,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTCPYF, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f+(%.4fN)", emmean, N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", N.trend / emmean * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
# N rate across location 
CPNYF <- ggplot(NdYFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP)) +
  geom_point(color='black') + #geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through predicted values
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=NdYFf, fun=~18.56+(-0.0047*.x),color='black')+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Crude Protien") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall \nRelationship between Crude Protien and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 28) +
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 10, y = 27, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 27, label = plvl),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18)) #change font size of axis titles
# save figures/Paper/CP_Nrate_N_yr2F  900x795
```

# CP anova tables
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modNTCPXS)
tableCPXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCPXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_CPXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modNTCPXF)
tableCPXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCPXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_CPXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modNTCPYS) 
tableCPYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCPYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_CPYS 

aov.tableYF <- anova(modNTCPYF)
tableCPYF = flextable(data = aov.tableYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableCPYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_CPYF

my_modelsNG <- list(modNTCPXS, modNTCPXF, modNTCPYS, modNTCPYF)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("linear", "linear", "linear", "linear"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_CP.png", expand = 10)
```

#Total CP N:E:C plot
```{r}
NdXSf1$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXS1, newdata = NdXSf1, re.form = NA)
NdXFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXF1, newdata = NdXFf, re.form = NA)
NdYSf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYS1, newdata = NdYSf, re.form = NA)
NdYFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYF1, newdata = NdYFf, re.form = NA)
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
NdYFf$P <- factor(NdYFf$P, levels = desired_order)
NdXSf1$P <- factor(NdXSf1$P, levels = desired_order)

# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest")
NdXSf$P <- factor(NdXSf$P, levels = desired_order)


max(NdXSf1$totCP)
max(NdXFf$totCP)
max(NdYSf$totCP)
max(NdYFf$totCP)
TCPcomboplot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = NdXSf1, aes(N, exp(predictedCP), color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data =NdXSf1, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Total CP",
    color = "Harvest", 
    linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 25) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG") )+
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("inter" = "solid", "monoA" = "dotted", "monoI" = "dashed"),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG"))


print(TCPcomboplot)

ggsave("TCPcomboplot.jpg", plot = TCPcomboplot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
#Total CP N:E plot
```{r}
NdXSf1$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXS1, newdata = NdXSf1, re.form = NA)
NdXFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXF1, newdata = NdXFf, re.form = NA)
NdYSf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYS1, newdata = NdYSf, re.form = NA)
NdYFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYF1, newdata = NdYFf, re.form = NA)
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
NdYFf$P <- factor(NdYFf$P, levels = desired_order)
NdXSf1$P <- factor(NdXSf1$P, levels = desired_order)

# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Fall Harvest", 
                  "Year 2 Summer Harvest")
NdXFf$P <- factor(NdXFf$P, levels = desired_order)


max(NdXSf1$totCP)
max(NdXFf$totCP)
max(NdYSf$totCP)
max(NdYFf$totCP)
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
TCPcomboplotNE <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = NdXFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Total CP",
    color = "Harvest", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 25) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG") )+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "MN"), fun=~18.67*exp(0.0000*.x),color='green')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "NY"), fun=~18.80*exp(-0.0005*.x),color='green')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, P== "WI"), fun=~14.21*exp(0.0001*.x),color='green')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, P== "NY"), fun=~9.05*exp(-0.0019*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, P== "KS"), fun=~8.62*exp(0.0001*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, P== "WI"), fun=~4.39*exp(0.0006*.x),color='blue')
  


print(TCPcomboplotNE)

ggsave("TCPcomboplotNE.jpg", plot = TCPcomboplot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
#Total CP N:C plot
```{r}
NdXSf1$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXS1, newdata = NdXSf1, re.form = NA)
NdXFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPXF1, newdata = NdXFf, re.form = NA)
NdYSf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYS1, newdata = NdYSf, re.form = NA)
NdYFf$predictedCP <- predict(modNTCPYF1, newdata = NdYFf, re.form = NA)
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
NdYFf$P <- factor(NdYFf$P, levels = desired_order)
NdXSf1$P <- factor(NdXSf1$P, levels = desired_order)

# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Fall Harvest", "Year 2 Summer Harvest", "Year 2 Fall Harvest")
NdXSf$P <- factor(NdXSf$P, levels = desired_order)
NdXFf$P <- factor(NdXFf$P, levels = desired_order)

max(NdXSf1$totCP)
max(NdXFf$totCP)
max(NdYSf$totCP)
max(NdYFf$totCP)
TCPcomboplotNC <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data =NdXFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data =NdYSf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data =NdYFf, aes(x = N, y = totCP, color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Total CP",
    color = "Harvest", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 25) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG") )+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP== "inter"), fun=~18.66*exp(0.0002*.x),color='green', linetype = "solid")+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP== "monoI"), fun=~17.63*exp(-0.0004*.x),color='green', linetype = "dashed")+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFf, CROP== "monoA"), fun=~19.43*exp(-0.0001*.x),color='green', linetype = "dotted")+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, CROP== "inter"), fun=~7.95*exp(-0.0020*.x),color='blue', linetype = "solid")+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, CROP== "monoI"), fun=~3.00*exp(0.0009*.x),color='blue', linetype = "dashed")+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSf, CROP== "monoA"), fun=~14.40*exp(-0.0001*.x),color='blue', linetype = "dotted")+
   geom_function(data=subset(NdYFf, CROP== "inter"), fun=~20.20*exp(-0.0000*.x),color='purple', linetype = "solid")+
   geom_function(data=subset(NdYFf, CROP== "monoI"), fun=~15.31*exp(-0.0007*.x),color='purple', linetype = "dashed")+
     geom_function(data=subset(NdYFf, CROP== "monoA"), fun=~20.72*exp(0.0001*.x),color='purple', linetype = "dotted")+
  geom_line(aes(x = c(0, 0), y = c(0, 0), linetype = "Intercropped")) +
  geom_line(aes(x = c(0, 0), y = c(0, 0), linetype = "Monoculture IWG"))+
   geom_line(aes(x = c(0, 0), y = c(0, 0), linetype = "Monoculture Alfalfa"))+
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System", values = c("solid", "dashed", "dotted"), labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa","Monoculture IWG")) +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = 'black'), title= "Line Type"))
   

print(TCPcomboplotNC)

ggsave("TCPcomboplotNC.jpg", plot = TCPcomboplotNC, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
#Total CP E:C plots (XF and YF)
```{r}
#XF
TCPXFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTCPXF1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(TCPXFemmsPC)
cld_dataTCPXFPC <- cld(TCPXFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataTCPXFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1", "cyan") 
TCPXFPC<-ggplot(NdXFf, aes(x = P, y = exp(predictedCP), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Total CP") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
   guides(color = "none")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(10,12.5, 15,17.5,20,22.5), limits = c(10, 25))

print(TCPXFPC)

#YF
TCPYFemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTCPYF1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(TCPYFemmsPC)
cld_dataTCPYFPC <- cld(TCPYFemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataTCPYFPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1", "cyan") 
TCPYFPC<-ggplot(NdYFf, aes(x = P, y = exp(predictedCP), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Total CP") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 2 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(10,12.5, 15,17.5,20,22.5), limits = c(10, 25))
print(TCPYFPC)




TCPEC<-grid.arrange(TCPXFPC, TCPYFPC, ncol = 2)
ggsave("TCPEC.jpg", plot = TCPEC, width =12, height = 6, dpi = 350)
```


#Total RFV year 1 summer
```{r}
modNTRFVXS<-lmer(totRFV~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXSo)
anova(modNTRFVXS)
#check assumptions 
NTRFVXS_resid<-resid(modNTRFVXS)
qqnorm(NTRFVXS_resid)
qqline(NTRFVXS_resid)
plot(modNTRFVXS)
#try log
#Remove a row with a 0 result
modNTRFVXS1<-lmer(log(totRFV)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXSo)
NTRFVXS_resid1<-resid(modNTRFVXS1)
qqnorm(NTRFVXS_resid1)
qqline(NTRFVXS_resid1)
plot(modNTRFVXS1)
anova(modNTRFVXS1)

#figure E:C (XS)
NdXSo$predicted <- predict(modNTRFVXS1, newdata = NdXSo, re.form = NA)
XSRFVemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTRFVXS1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(XSRFVemmsPC)
cld_dataXSRFVPC <- cld(XSRFVemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataXSRFVPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom labels
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
xlabels <- c("Kansas", "Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
RFVXSPC<-ggplot(NdXSo, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "RFV") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Summer \nbacktransformed for visualization")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(RFVXSPC)
#ggsave("figures/Paper/RFVXSPC.jpg", plot = RFVXSPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# equations and plot N:C
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTRFVXS1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))    
  desired_order_P <- c("KS", "MN", "NY", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTRFVXS1, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA", "monoI"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
sorted_df2
sorted_I <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "inter")
sorted_A <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoA")
sorted_M <- subset(sorted_df2, CROP== "monoI")
sym_I <- sorted_I %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 175
  )
sym_A <- sorted_A %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 170
  )
sym_M <- sorted_M %>%
  distinct(CROP, plvl) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 165
  )
# N rate across C 
RFVNCXS <- ggplot(data=NdXSo) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSo, aes(x = N, y = totRFV, shape = CROP)) +
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSo, CROP == "inter"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~84.22*exp(0.0000*.x), color='#000000')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSo, CROP == "monoA"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~95.52*exp(-0.0001*.x), color='#000000')+
    geom_function(data=subset(NdXSo, CROP == "monoI"), aes(linetype = CROP), fun=~71.83*exp(0.0004*.x), color='#000000')+
  ggtitle("Year 1 Summer \nRelationship between RFV and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 180) +
  geom_text(data = sorted_I, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 175, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_A, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 170, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_A, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sorted_M, mapping = aes(x = 20, y = 165, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 25, size = 1, fill = "lightgrey", stroke = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sym_I, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 175, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_A, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 170, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  geom_text(data = sym_M, mapping = aes(x = 40, y = 165, label = plvl))+ # add stars to figure
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                      values = c(inter = "dotdash", inter = "dotdash", monoA = "dotted", monoA = "dotted", monoI = "dashed", monoI = "dashed")) +
scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System",
                      labels = c(inter = "Intercropped", inter = "Intercropped", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoA = "Monoculture Alfalfa", monoI = "Monoculture IWG", monoI = "Monoculture IWG"),
                     values = c(4, 1, 25, 4, 1, 25))+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "RFV", shape = "Cropping System") +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18), #change font size of axis titles
        plot.title=element_text(size=20), #change font size of plot title
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of legend title
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 18)) #change font size of facet title
RFVNCXS
# save figures/Paper/RFVNCXS    970x780
```

#Total RFV year 1 fall
```{r}
modNTRFVXF<-lmer(totRFV~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFo)
anova(modNTRFVXF)
#check assumptions 
NTRFVXF_resid<-resid(modNTRFVXF)
qqnorm(NTRFVXF_resid)
qqline(NTRFVXF_resid)
plot(modNTRFVXF)
#try log 
modNTRFVXF1<-lmer(log(totRFV)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFo)
NTRFVXF_resid1<-resid(modNTRFVXF1)
qqnorm(NTRFVXF_resid1)
qqline(NTRFVXF_resid1)
plot(modNTRFVXF1)
anova(modNTRFVXF1)

# Boxplot for RFV by E
NdXFo$predicted <- predict(modNTRFVXF1, newdata = NdXFo, re.form = NA)
CPemmsP <- emmeans(modNTRFVXF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsP)
cld_dataCPP <- cld(CPemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
RFVEXF <- ggplot(NdXFo, aes(x = P, y = totRFV)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -15, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 1 Fall Crude Protien by Location", x = "Location", y = "Crude Protien")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
# save figures/Paper/RFVEXF

# Boxplot for RFV by C
NdXFo$predicted <- predict(modNTRFVXF1, newdata = NdXFo, re.form = NA)
CPemmsP <- emmeans(modNTRFVXF1, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
emms_df <- as.data.frame(CPemmsP)
cld_dataCPP <- cld(CPemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataCPP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
RFVCXF <- ggplot(NdXFo, aes(x = CROP, y = totRFV)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = -15, hjust = 1.5)+
  labs(title = "Year 1 Fall", x = "Cropping System", y = "Total RFV")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))
# save figures/Paper/RFVCXF
```
#Total RFV year 2 summer
```{r}
modNTRFVYS<-lmer(totRFV~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSo)
anova(modNTRFVYS)
#check assumptions 
NTRFVYS_resid<-resid(modNTRFVYS)
qqnorm(NTRFVYS_resid)
qqline(NTRFVYS_resid)
plot(modNTRFVYS)
#try log. 
modNTRFVYS1<-lmer(log(totRFV+0.0001)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSo)
NTRFVYS_resid1<-resid(modNTRFVYS1)
qqnorm(NTRFVYS_resid1)
qqline(NTRFVYS_resid1)
plot(modNTRFVYS1)
anova(modNTRFVYS1)

#Pairwise NPC
emmsNPC <- emmeans(modNTRFVYS1, ~ N*P*CROP,at= list(N = N_levels), type= "response") 
cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC <- cld(emmsNPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC$response <- format(cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC<- cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC %>%
  select(N, P, CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC) <- c("N", "Site", "Cropping System", "Total RFV", "Group")
cld_dataNTRFVYSNPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNTRFVYS1, ~ N,at= list(N = N_levels), type= "response") 
cld_dataNTRFVYSN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNTRFVYSN$response <- format(cld_dataNTRFVYSN$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNTRFVYSN) <- NULL
cld_dataNTRFVYSN<- cld_dataNTRFVYSN %>%
  select(N, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNTRFVYSN) <- c("N", "Total RFV", "Group")
cld_dataNTRFVYSN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#This gives us the slope for each interactions as well as a P value indicating significance level for that slope
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTRFVYS1,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
  #view(emtrends_df)

  summary(modNTRFVYS1)
  
  #emmeans for intercepts! via erika
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTRFVYS1,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$P <- factor(emtrends_df$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTRFVYS1, ~P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("P", "CROP")) %>%
  select(P, CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
view(merged_df)
merged_df$P <- factor(merged_df$P, levels = c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoI","monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange(P, CROP)
view(sorted_df)
```
#Total RFV year 2 Fall
```{r}
modNTRFVYF<-lmer(totRFV~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFo)
anova(modNTRFVYF)
#check assumptions 
NTRFVYF_resid<-resid(modNTRFVYF)
qqnorm(NTRFVYF_resid)
qqline(NTRFVYF_resid)
plot(modNTRFVYF)
#try log
modNTRFVYF1<-lmer(log(totRFV)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFo)
NTRFVYF_resid1<-resid(modNTRFVYF1)
qqnorm(NTRFVYF_resid1)
qqline(NTRFVYF_resid1)
plot(modNTRFVYF1)
anova(modNTRFVYF1)

#figure E:C (YF)

NdYFo$predicted <- predict(modNTRFVYF1, newdata = NdYFo, re.form = NA)
YFRFVemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTRFVYF1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(YFRFVemmsPC)
cld_dataYFRFVPC <- cld(YFRFVemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataYFRFVPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
RFVYFPC<-ggplot(NdYFo, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), shape = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "RFV") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2.5)+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels, values = c(4, 1, 25))+
     ggtitle("Year 2 Fall \nbacktransformed for visualization")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=16), #change font size of axis titles
        legend.text=element_text(size=10), #change font size of legend text
        legend.title=element_text(size=14)) #change font size of legend title
print(RFVYFPC)
#ggsave("figures/Paper/RFVYFPC.jpg", plot = RFVYFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Boxplot for RFV by E
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Minnesota", "New York", "Wisconsin")
RFVEYF <- ggplot(NdYFo, aes(x = P, y = totRFV)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall", x = "Location", y = "Total RFV")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

# Boxplot for RFV by C
# Custom X-axis labels 
xlabels <- c("Intercropping", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
RFVCYF <- ggplot(NdYFo, aes(x = CROP, y = totRFV)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Year 2 Fall", x = "Cropping System", y = "Total RFV")+
  scale_x_discrete(label = xlabels)+ 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18))

#EQUATION table JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNTRFVYF1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  emtrends_df$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_df$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_df$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNTRFVYF1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
# N rate across location 
RFVNYF <- ggplot(NdYFo, aes(x = N, y = totRFV)) +
  geom_point(color='black') + #geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  #use function from new_df calculated above
  geom_function(data=NdYFo, fun=~140.05*exp(-0.0003*.x),color='black')+
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "RFV") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall Relationship between RFV and N-rate \nbacktransformed for visualization") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 275) +
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 10, y = 270, label = equation),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_text(data = new_df, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 270, label = plvl),  size=4)+ # add equation to figure
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), #change font size of axis text
        axis.title=element_text(size=18)) #change font size of axis titles
# save figures/Paper/RFV_Nrate_N_yr2F  900x795
```

# RFV anova tables
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modNTRFVXS1)
tableRFVXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableRFVXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_RFVXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modNTRFVXF1)
tableRFVXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableRFVXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_RFVXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modNTRFVYS1) 
tableRFVYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableRFVYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_RFVYS 

aov.tableYF <- anova(modNTRFVYF1)
tableRFVYF = flextable(data = aov.tableYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column("term")%>%
                    mutate(term = dplyr::case_when(
                        term == "P" ~ "E",
                        term == "CROP" ~ "C",
                        term == "N:P" ~ "N:E",
                        term == "N:CROP" ~ "N:C",
                        term == "P:CROP" ~ "E:C",
                        term == "N:P:CROP" ~ "N:E:C",
                        TRUE ~ term))
                    )%>%
                    set_header_labels(term = "")
print(tableRFVYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_RFVYF

my_modelsNG <- list(modNTRFVXS1, modNTRFVXF1, modNTRFVYS1, modNTRFVYF1)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 Summer", "Year 1 Fall", "Year 2 Summer", "Year 2 Fall")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "harvest") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
#  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N", "Nitrogen Rate (N)", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "CROP", "C", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:C", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:C", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(harvest, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)|>
  mutate(model = c("log", "log", "log", "log"))|>
  relocate(model, .after = harvest)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_RFV.png", expand = 10)
```

#Total RFV plot N:E:C
```{r}
NdXSo$predictedRFV <- predict(modNTRFVXS1, newdata = NdXSo, re.form = NA)
NdXFo$predictedRFV <- predict(modNTRFVXF1, newdata = NdXFo, re.form = NA)
NdYSo$predictedRFV <- predict(modNTRFVYS1, newdata = NdYSo, re.form = NA)
NdYFo$predictedRFV <- predict(modNTRFVYF1, newdata = NdYFo, re.form = NA)

# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple")
legend_order <- c( "Year 2 Summer Harvest")
NdYSo$P <- factor(NdYSo$P, levels = desired_order)
max(NdXSo$totRFV)
max(NdXFo$totRFV)
max(NdYSo$totRFV)
max(NdYFo$totRFV)
TRFVcomboplot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = NdYSo, aes(N, exp(predictedRFV), color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSo, aes(x = N, y = totRFV, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Total RFV",
    color = "Harvest", 
    linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 190) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
   scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG") )+
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("inter" = "solid", "monoA" = "dotted", "monoI" = "dashed"),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG"))


print(TRFVcomboplot)

ggsave("TRFVcomboplot.jpg", plot = TRFVcomboplot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
#Total RFV E:C plots (XS)
```{r}
#XS
TRFVXSemmsPC <- emmeans(modNTRFVXS1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(TRFVXSemmsPC)
cld_dataTRFVXSPC <- cld(TRFVXSemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataTRFVXSPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa", "Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1", "cyan") 
TRFVXSPC<-ggplot(NdXSo, aes(x = P, y = exp(predictedRFV), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Total RFV") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

print(TRFVXSPC)

ggsave("TRFVXSPC.jpg", plot = TRFVXSPC, width =12, height = 6, dpi = 350)
```

```{r}
#XF

TRFVXFE<-ggplot(NdXFo, aes(x = P, y = exp(predictedRFV))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Toal RFV") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+

                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)+
  ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(100, 120, 140, 160), limits = c(85, 160))

#YF

emms_df <- as.data.frame(NTRFVYFemmsP)
cld_dataNTRFVYFP <- cld(NTRFVYFemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNTRFVYFP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))

  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Toal RFV") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)+
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(100, 120, 140, 160), limits = c(85, 160))

TRFVE<-grid.arrange(TRFVXFE, TRFVYFE, ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#XF
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa","Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta","coral1", "cyan") 
NXFTRFVemmsC <- emmeans(modNTRFVXF1, ~ CROP, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NXFTRFVemmsC)
cld_dataNXFTRFVC <- cld(NXFTRFVemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNXFTRFVC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
TRFVXFC<-ggplot(NdXFo, aes(x = CROP, y = exp(predictedRFV), color= CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Cropping System", y = "Total RFV") +
  ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = custom_labels)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(100,120,140,160), limits = c(75, 160))

#YF
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa","Monoculture IWG")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta","coral1", "cyan") 
NYFTRFVemmsC <- emmeans(modNTRFVYF1, ~ CROP, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYFTRFVemmsC)
cld_dataNYFTRFVC <- cld(NYFTRFVemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYFTRFVC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
TRFVYFC<-ggplot(NdYFo, aes(x = CROP, y = exp(predictedRFV), color= CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Cropping System", y = "Total RFV") +
  ggtitle("Year 2 Fall")+
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = custom_labels)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(100,120,140,160), limits = c(75, 160))

TRFVC<-grid.arrange(TRFVXFC, TRFVYFC, ncol = 2)
ggsave("TRFVC.jpg", plot = TRFVC, width =12, height = 6, dpi = 350)

```

#Total RFV E XF YF
```{r}
#RFVEXF
#RFVEYF
RFVcomboplotEXFYF <- ggarrange(RFVEXF, RFVEYF, ncol=2)
#ggsave("figures/Paper/RFVcomboplotEXFYF.jpg", plot = RFVcomboplotEXFYF, width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
#Total RFV C XF YF
```{r}
#RFVCXF
#RFVCYF
RFVcomboplotCXFYF <- ggarrange(RFVCXF, RFVCYF, ncol=2)
#ggsave("figures/Paper/RFVcomboplotCXFYF.jpg", plot = RFVcomboplotCXFYF, width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

#Total RFV E:C XS YF
```{r}
#RFVXSPC
#RFVYFPC
RFVcomboplotECXSYF <- ggarrange(RFVXSPC, RFVYFPC, ncol=2, common.legend = TRUE,
legend = "right")
#ggsave("figures/Paper/RFVcomboplotECXSYF.jpg", plot = RFVcomboplotECXSYF, width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
